One of our key suppliers has been hit by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and gone silent on us. I fear the worst, but if we can still recover the supplies they were transporting, it could make a huge difference.

Chances are the outlaws who attacked them are still lurking around there so be on your guard. Once you've dealt with them, grab the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Make sure you're flying a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> too.

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.tr:
边境生活艰难，每一次给我们定居者的补给都至关重要，今年我们真的不能再有更多损失了。

在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 有位我们的关键供应商遭到一伙不法分子袭击，此后便彻底失联。我担心最坏的情况已经发生，但如果还能抢回他们当时运输的物资，那将意义重大。

袭击他们的不法分子很可能仍潜伏在附近，务必提高警惕。等你清理掉他们后，尽快取走货物，并运送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯。请确保你驾驶的飞船能装载 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸的集装箱</EM4>，同时务必配备一把 <EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>。

祝你在那飞行平安，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

RAIN_intro_desc_01.en:
To all available contractors,

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond. 

A research initiative at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> is in desperate need of resources, so we are looking for a reliable contractor to obtain and deliver these crucial components.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

Rayari offers competitive wages along with the knowledge that you're building a better universe.

Let’s grow together,

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_intro_desc_01.tr:
拉亚利公司正在寻找独立承包商，为我们在帝国及其他地区推动科学、农业和医学发展的努力提供额外支持。

位于 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的一项研究项目急需一些资源，因此我们正在寻找可靠的承包商来获取并交付这些关键成分。

有关这些动物的更多信息，请参阅您日志中的<EM4>《斯坦顿野生动物指南》</EM4>。

拉亚利提供具有竞争力的薪酬，并让您知道您正在为构建一个更美好的宇宙贡献力量。

让我们携手共进，

纳丽娜·勒雷姆
高级经理
临床研究外包

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descriptio.en:
Looking for a hauler to pick up some cargo for me. Thing is, there’s a catch.

The cargo’s in the back of an abandoned ship located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. As you may have figured, this ain’t our cargo, but it sure as hell doesn’t deserve to go to anyone else. I’ll be damned if those CFP assholes get their hands on it before we do.

Be lucky as hell if we were the first to know about this, but I’d wager there’s gonna be more ships swarming around there than flies on a kopian carcass. If you got some pals you can trust, bring them along and ghost those assholes. And don’t forget your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> of course.

You manage to get that cargo and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, I can get you a nice cut of the sale.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descriptio.tr:
货就在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那艘废弃飞船的后头，你也知道，这货不是我们的，但更不能让别人拿走。要真让那帮繁荣公民的混蛋先得手，我还不如直接跳船。

咱们算走运，是第一个知道这事儿的，但我打赌现在那儿的飞船肯定多得跟寇骈犬尸体上的苍蝇一样。要是你有信得过的兄弟，带上去把那些杂种都干掉。当然，别忘了你的<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>。

你要是能把货弄到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯那儿，我给你抽一大笔分成。

斯托斯通讯完毕。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M2_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
From the personnel files recovered at the Onyx Facility, we have now learned that Dr. Jorrit has recently visited the site and accessed files while there. The next step will be to follow this lead and try to learn exactly what Dr. Jorrit was doing in his old lab.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
I've found a work around for the QT issue so you'll be able to travel directly to the site from now on.

Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M2_desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件更新：
从玛瑙设施找到的人事档案中，我们得知约里特博士最近曾到访过该地点，并在那儿访问了一些文档。接下来的任务是顺着这条线索，查清楚约里特博士在他的旧实验室里到底做了些什么。

合约调查员的行动：
探索<EM4>工程</EM4>翼楼并<EM4>获取约里特博士近期的文件</EM4>。

补充说明：
我已经找到了一个解决量子航行问题的办法，所以从现在开始你可以直接航行那个地点了。

小心站点现场可能出现的敌对势力。

前往玛瑙设施时，请使用可停放在大型机库的载具。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M3_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update:
The files you found in Engineering confirm that Dr. Jorrit is actively pursuing something at the site, but it is still unclear what the doctor is up to. I’m hoping that if you can find the data he was accessing in Research it will provide further clarity.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing to locate and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4> .

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you accessed these files, I'll be sending you <EM4>5 Secure Drives</EM4> with copies of whatever data we've gathered so far. You can collect them at your home location.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M3_desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件更新：
你在工程区找到的文件证实，约里特博士正在这个地点积极追查某些东西，但目前还不清楚他到底在搞什么名堂。我希望如果你能找到他在研究区访问的数据，可能会让事情更明朗一些。

合约调查员的行动：
探索<EM4>研究</EM4>翼楼，找到并<EM4>获取约里特博士近期的文件</EM4>。

补充说明：
小心站点现场可能出现的敌对势力。

前往玛瑙设施时，请使用可停放在大型机库的载具。

一旦你访问了这些文件，我会给你发送<EM4> 5 个安全驱动器</EM4>，里面会有我们目前收集到的所有数据的副本。你可以在你的家园位置领取它们。

ItemGathering_ASD_Desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
In going through the files, I’ve seen a couple of allusions to a specific lab sample that would potentially be useful to have our people analyze. Not sure where it is exactly, but if you hunt around Onyx Facility you should be able to find the sample and bring it to me.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Onyx Facility Research Wing</EM4> and <EM4>track down the Lab Sample</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
ItemGathering_ASD_Desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件更新：
在翻阅文档时，我发现提到了一个特定的实验室样本，要是能让我们的人分析一下应该会很有用。不过不确定具体在哪儿，但你只要在玛瑙设施里仔细找找，应该就能找到样本，然后带回来给我。

合约调查员的行动：
探索<EM4>玛瑙设施研究翼楼</EM4>，<EM4>找到实验室样本</EM4>，然后将它送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

补充说明：
小心站点现场可能出现的敌对势力。

驾驶一辆可以停放在大型机库中的车辆前往玛瑙设施。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has requested that Hockrow compile a complete dossier on infamous scientist <EM4>Dr. Logan Jorrit</EM4>. Believed responsible for the incidents at Associated Science & Development’s Lazarus site, the client is eager to get a broader view of Dr. Logan and his research.

Contract Investigator Actions: 
Gain access to ASD’s shuttered <EM4>Onyx Facility</EM4> where Dr. Jorrit was formerly the Lead Scientist.  Once there, locate and <EM4>access the research lab’s personnel files</EM4> so that we can get an overview of what was going on there.

Additional Notes:
The QT beacon to the site was deactivated when the facility went dark so you'll have to fly the last leg manually.

While ASD has formally closed the facility, caution is still advised. Not only may the labs themselves be hazardous, but the surrounding area shows signs of recent visitors. Scavengers or squatters may be on site.

I've also managed to wrangle an employee ID code for you so as long as you're on the job, you'll be able to access the computers there. 

Additionally, Onyx Facility only has large hangars available, so plan your travel appropriately.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M1_desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
一位客户请求霍克罗事务所为臭名昭著的科学家<EM4>洛根·约里特博士</EM4>编纂一份完整的卷宗。洛根博士被认为对发生在联合科学与开发公司拉撒路站点的事件负有责任，客户迫切希望更全面地了解洛根博士及其研究内容。

合约调查员的行动：
进入 ASD 已经关闭的<EM4>玛瑙设施</EM4>，洛根博士曾是该设施的首席科学家。到达后，找到并<EM4>访问研究实验室的人事档案</EM4>，以便我们能大致了解那里曾经发生的事情。

补充说明：
当设施断电时，通往该地点的量子航行信标也被停用了，所以你得手动驾驶飞船飞完最后一段路程。

虽然 ASD 已正式关闭该设施，但仍需保持警惕。不仅实验室本身可能存在危险，周围区域也显示出近期有人活动的迹象。可能会有拾荒者或擅闯人员在现场。

此外，我设法为你搞到了一个员工 ID 代码，只要你在执行任务，就能访问那里的电脑。

还有，玛瑙设施只有大型机库可用，因此请合理规划你的行程。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M4_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
The seismic data you extracted had some interesting revelations. My expert says she thinks that Jorrit might have been excavating down there. Hate to think what he’s doing, but it's our job to find out. I think we’re close to cracking this, so I want you to go back to Onyx and gather the Power Usage data. If we can track energy flow from the last couple months, a pattern should reveal itself. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>upload the Power Usage data</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll be sending you <EM4>10 Secure Drives</EM4> with copies of the information we've gathered so far. You can collect them at your home location.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M4_desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件更新：
你提取的地震波数据里有一些有趣的发现。我的专家表示，她觉得乔里特可能在下面进行过挖掘。虽然不太想猜测他在干嘛，但搞清楚这是我们的任务。我觉得我们快找到答案了，所以我想让你返回玛瑙，收集能源用量数据。如果我们能追踪过去几个月的能源流动，应该就能发现一些规律。

合约调查员的行动：
探索<EM4>工程</EM4>翼楼并<EM4>上传能源用量数据</EM4>。

补充说明：
小心站点现场可能出现的敌对势力。

驾驶一辆可以停放在大型机库中的车辆前往玛瑙设施。

一旦你交出这些数据，我会给你发送<EM4> 10 个 ASD 安全驱动器</EM4>，里面会有我们目前收集到的所有数据的副本。你可以在你的家园位置领取它们。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P3M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
All your digging around Onyx has paid off. I’ve been able to confirm that Jorrit has been operating an off-the-record lab in the facility’s Site-B in order to conduct an experiment he calls “Project Hyperion.” I’ll send his <EM4>lab notes to your mobiGlas journal</EM4> once you’re underway, but the long and short of it is the bastard is trying to make Humans evolve or some nonsense like that.

The client wants the experimental data, so you’re going back to Onyx and do everything needed to get Project Hyperion up and running. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Prep the experiment by collecting a <EM4>Reagent code from the Engineering wing</EM4> and a <EM4>Catalyst code from the Research wing</EM4>.

Once you have those, head down to the <EM4>Lab in Site-B</EM4> and <EM4>run the experiment</EM4> so you can <EM4>upload the results</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Since this is an active lab, there might be ASD security on-site.
 
Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P3M1_desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件更新：
你在玛瑙设施的深入调查终于有了收获。我已确认乔里特一直在站点-B 秘密运营着一个未登记的实验室，进行他称之为“海伯利安项目”的实验。等你出发后，我会把他的<EM4>实验笔记发送到你的 mobiGlas 日志中</EM4>，简单来说，这个混蛋想让人类进化，或者诸如此类的荒唐事。

客户需要这些实验数据，所以你得重返玛瑙设施，完成一切必要步骤，启动“海伯利安项目”。

合约调查员的行动：
先去<EM4>工程区获取反应物代码</EM4>，再去<EM4>研究区获取催化剂代码</EM4>，为实验做好准备。

拿到代码后，前往<EM4>站点-B 的实验室</EM4>，<EM4>运行实验</EM4>，然后<EM4>上传实验结果</EM4>。

补充说明：
由于这是个仍在运作的实验室，现场可能有联合科学与开发公司的安保人员。

前往玛瑙设施时，请使用可停放在大型机库的载具。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
Reviewing Dr. Jorrit’s recent files that you uploaded to me left us with more questions than answers. While we know for a fact that the doctor had been inside Onyx, we don’t yet know the specifics of what he was doing. The client is eager for us to learn more about what exactly Jorrit’s up to, so I’m afraid you’re going to have to go back in.

I have a few ideas on how we might be able to use the facility’s systems to pinpoint Dr. Jorrit’s activities, though you’ll have to physically bring me the data this time so we can properly analyze it. First up, are the energy sensors in Engineering. They’re still active and sensitive enough to pick up any anomalous readings.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Energy Anomaly data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M1_desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件更新：
查看你上传给我的约里特博士的最新文件后，我们产生的问题比得到的答案还多。虽然我们确信博士曾经进入过玛瑙，但还不清楚他具体在做什么。客户很想知道约里特到底在搞什么名堂，所以恐怕你得再进去一趟了。

我有几个想法，或许可以利用设施的系统来精确定位约里特博士的活动。不过这次你得亲自把数据带回来，我们才能好好分析。首先，工程区的能量传感器还在运作，而且足够灵敏，能捕捉到任何异常读数。

合约调查员的行动：
探索<EM4>工程</EM4>翼楼，<EM4>检索能量异常数据</EM4>，并将其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

补充说明：
小心站点现场可能出现的敌对势力。

前往玛瑙设施时，请使用可停放在大型机库的载具。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M2_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
We were able to pull some very interesting data from what you delivered, but we still don’t have a clear enough picture. What we did concretely learn though is that the Onyx security monitoring system is still operational. The data from there is going to be your next target.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Security data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M2_desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件更新：
你送来的东西让我们找到了一些非常有趣的数据，但我们的信息还不够全面。不过我们确实确认了一件事，那就是玛瑙安保监控系统仍然在运行。那里的数据将是你的下一个目标。

合约调查员的行动：
探索<EM4>研究</EM4>翼楼，<EM4>检索安保数据</EM4>，并将其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

补充说明：
小心站点现场可能出现的敌对势力。

前往玛瑙设施时，请使用可停放在大型机库的载具。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M3_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
Thanks to that last batch of data you delivered, we’re starting to fill in the gaps on what Dr. Jorrit’s doing down there. Got a rough timeline of his activities. Seems he’s had more stuff coming into Onyx than going out which is interesting. We’re going to need more intel though. There’s an old experiment running down there that monitors minute seismic changes. If you can deliver that data to me, it’ll help us pinpoint some of the movement around the facility.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Seismic data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION].</EM4>

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site.
 
Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M3_desc.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #JD10285
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件更新：
多亏了你上次送来的

一旦你交出这些数据，我会给你发送一个<EM4>ASD 安全驱动器</EM4>，你可以在你的家园位置领取它们。数据，我们开始填补乔里特博士在那边干了什么的空白了。现在已经大致梳理出了他的活动时间线。看起来他往玛瑙运进来的东西比运出去的多，这挺有意思。不过我们还需要更多情报。那边有个老旧实验在持续地监测微小的地震波变化。如果你能把那些数据带给我，会帮助我们更准确地掌握设施周围的活动。

合约调查员的行动：
探索<EM4>研究</EM4>翼楼，<EM4>检索地震波数据</EM4>，并将其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

补充说明：
小心站点现场可能出现的敌对势力。

前往玛瑙设施时，请使用可停放在大型机库的载具。

Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
It would be helpful to have the most recent energy anomaly data so that we can compare it to what you delivered last time. Any difference between the two data sets could prove useful.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Energy Anomaly data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

合约调查员的行动：

Case File #JD10285

Out of an over-abundance of caution, it would be good to see if the security systems have picked up anything new since the last batch of data you delivered. That way we can make sure we’re up-to-date on what’s been happening down there.

出于格外谨慎的考虑，最好检查一下自你上次提交数据后，安保系统是否捕捉到了什么新情况。这样就能确保我们及时了解那里最近发生的事情。

Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
One of the biggest issue when it comes to ongoing investigations is intel growing stale. To help alleviate that, I’m going to have you head back into Onyx and grab the latest seismic sensor data. Would be good to see what the latest readings say.

在持续调查中，最大的问题之一就是情报会变得过时。为了缓解这个问题，我打算让你重新进入玛瑙，获取最新的地震波传感器数据。看看最新的读数能告诉我们些什么，这会很有帮助。

BHG_Certification_Hard_Desc.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As your standing in the community continues to grow, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Journeyman Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend High-Risk Targets (HRT). These criminals can travel in larger multicrew ships with several escorts. The additional offensive and defensive capabilities make them difficult targets for all but the most skilled guild members.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a HRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
BHG_Certification_Hard_Desc.tr:
--------------------------------------------------------
---------------------  赏金合约  ---------------------
--------------------------------------------------------

赏金猎人公会
处理与分配部门

赏金猎人公会已授权一份官方赏金

姓名：[TARGET]
星系：[SYSTEM]
风险评估：高
最后已知位置：[LOCATION]
已知关联：< 无 >
注意：随着您在圈内的地位不断提高，赏金猎人公会想为您提供获得“职业赏金猎人执照”的机会。

此执照表示您有资格追踪和逮捕高风险目标（HRT）。这些目标是在多人护送下乘坐大型多人船移动的罪犯。 额外的进攻和防御能力使他们成为除了那些老练成员外，大多数人的棘手目标。

您必须成功缉拿这个名为 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的高风险目标，才能通过认证，他最后一次出现是在 <EM4>[LOCATION]/<EM4>。


赏金猎人公会
追求正义

赏金猎人公会是一个由雇佣兵公会批准的安保服务，根据《外星贸易授权法案》被授权在 UEE 及其以外地区开展行动。

FTL_Courier_Stanton_Medium_Desc_001.en:
AVAILABLE FTL CONTRACT
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS**
Junior-level courier needed for deliveries across the Stanton System.
Transportation must be provided by courier.
You will be <EM4>required to lift up to .25 SCU</EM4> in weight.
Couriers are responsible for the correct handling and safety of all packages charged to their care.

Good luck and good speed, courier!
FTL_Courier_Stanton_Medium_Desc_001.tr:
可用超光速快递合约
紧急任务分配

**合约详情**
需一名初级快递员，在斯坦顿星系内执行投递任务。
运输工具须由快递员自行提供。
你需要能<EM4>搬运重量 0.25 SCU 大小</EM4>的货物。
快递员须对其负责的所有包裹承担正确操作与安全保障责任。

[SIGN_OFF]

RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

One of the folks over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> just hit me up about a pile of cargo, <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller, that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots.   

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]  

I'm trusting you to set your own route here, so don't mess it up. And try to stay away from anywhere too dangerous. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.
RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_01.tr:
红风物流
“您的货物，有我保障”
----------------------------

在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的某个朋友刚联系我，说有一堆货物，尺寸 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4> 或更小，需要运到几个不同的地方。

卸货地点（任意顺序）
[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

我相信你会自己规划路线，所以别搞砸了。另外，尽量避开危险的地方。还有别忘了随身携带一个<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>。

RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_waste_de.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a bunch of comms this morning. Seems one of the local trash collectors' ship is busted and we're gonna be picking up the slack.

I got a bunch of trash (<EM4>32 SCU</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.
RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_waste_de.tr:
红风物流
“您的货物，有我保障”
----------------------------

今天早上收到了很多通讯。看起来当地的一个垃圾收集船坏了，我们得去帮忙。

这里有一堆垃圾，（尺寸 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4> 或更小）在几个不同的地点，准备送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯。

取货地点（任意顺序）
[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

还有别忘了随身携带一个<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>。

headhunters_killship_cfp_hrt_desc_001.en:
Need another CFP ship taken out. It belongs to [TARGET], who's been  driving locals out of their homes if they don't accept Citizens for Prosperity help. They're a real piece of work and we've been given the go-ahead to take them down.

Their ship was spotted around [LOCATION], so head out there and do the deed.

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_cfp_hrt_desc_001.tr:
需要再处理一艘繁荣公民的船。它属于 [TARGET]，这个家伙一直在逼迫当地人，如果他们不接受繁荣公民的帮助，就得离开他们的家。他们真是个麻烦，我们已经得到了指示，可以解决他们。

他们的船在 [LOCATION] 附近被发现，所以赶紧去那里完成任务。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_E_.en:
Looking for any hitters available for a quick gig. Over at [LOCATION], they're getting hit by some geniuses led by [TARGET]. We've tussled against [TARGET] in the past so it's no surprise they haven't wised up. 

We want you to head there and take them down. Kill whoever you like, but [TARGET] should be your focus.

Stows out.
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_E_.tr:
寻找可以迅速出击的打手。在 [LOCATION] 那里，他们正遭到一群由 [TARGET] 领导的“天才”们的攻击。我们之前和 [TARGET] 有过冲突，所以他们没能吸取教训也就不足为奇了。

我们希望你去那里将他们击败。你可以杀任何人，但 [TARGET] 应该是你的重点目标。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_E_desc_001.en:
Some folks will do anything for a few creds. There’s a group of upstart outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that have decided to start manufacturing drugs. Turns out they’re not too good at it, or maybe a little too good. The junk they’re pumping out is stronger than the normal stuff and a real danger to anyone who uses it. 

We’ve been hired to knock out their operation and destroy whatever drugs stashes are on site. Armed guards are protecting the place, but they don’t seem too skilled. Our surveillance teams observed one of them almost shoot himself in the foot. Can’t say for certain, but odds are they won’t give a pro like you too many problems.  

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_E_desc_001.tr:
有些人为了几个信用点什么都愿意做。在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那里，有一群新兴的不法分子决定开始制造毒品。结果发现他们的技术不太好，或者说有点太好。他们生产的垃圾比普通的毒品要强得多，对任何使用它的人都是真正的危险。

我们被雇佣来摧毁他们的运作并销毁现场藏匿的毒品。武装保安正在保护这个地方，但他们似乎并不太专业。我们的监视团队观察到其中一个人差点把自己脚射了。我不敢肯定，但很可能他们不会给像你这样的专业人士带来太多麻烦。

马库斯·克伦
福克斯韦尔安保
“安全，尽在掌握”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得 UEE 全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们始终欢迎新的干员加入我们的大家庭。如果您或您认识的任何人对此感兴趣，请与我们的合约代表联系。

headhunters_sabotage_generators_multi_M_.en:
Got a few scavs that have rooted themselves into [LOCATION]. We have our own plans there and need the place cleared out. 

That's why I want you to ho and turn off their power. Let's see if that doesn't cause these rats to abandon the place for good.

-Stows
headhunters_sabotage_generators_multi_M_.tr:
有几个垃圾佬已经在 [LOCATION] 安了家。但我们在那有自己的计划，所以需要把地方清理干净。

所以我希望你能去那儿关掉他们的电源。看看这样是否能让这些老鼠永远离开这个地方。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
Hi, it's El.

Need a hauler for a job ASAP. One of our contractors had a "personal emergency" and had to ditch their ship and it seems like they're not coming back. Not ideal, really.

Good news is the cargo is still intact, at least according to the tracker. It'd be a huge win for me if you could finish the job by grabbing the cargo at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bringing it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Seems like this was a pretty big one, you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Really appreciate your help.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.tr:
嗨，我是艾拉。

这活儿得赶紧找人干，我们有个承包商突然有“私人紧急情况”，直接扔下飞船跑了，看样子是不打算回来了，够糟心的。

好消息是货还在，至少追踪器上显示没丢。你能赶去 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 把货捞回来，再送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯那儿吗，那对我来说真是帮大忙了！

这单子挺大的，你得开艘能装得下 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的船，还得配把<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>才搬得动。真谢谢你啦！

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·蒂埃诺
初级物流协调员
科瓦莱什货运
“尽你所需，达你所在。”


科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司，为鼓励及时交付和防止货运欺诈，科瓦莱什货运将设定交货时间限制。到期后，任何未交付的货物将被视为被盗。总酬金将会根据货物成功交付的百分比按比例支付。

headhunters_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.en:
Sending a call out to anyone nearby. Got a pretty heavy work order for one of our outposts at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Sounds like we need <EM4>six fuses</EM4> fixed. You'll also need a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC to patch up about five pipes</EM4> to stop the place from falling apart.

If you bring all the shit needed to patch them up, we'll pay you out.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
headhunters_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.tr:
呼叫附近能干活的。我们在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 有个前哨站需要大修，得搞定 <EM4>六个保险丝</EM4>。你还得带上 <EM4>打捞工具</EM4> 和 <EM4>足够修补五根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4>，防止这破地方彻底垮掉。

把修修补补的破烂工具都带齐了，我们就给你结账。

希望你知道该怎么做，不过建议你翻翻 mobiGlas 日志里的 <EM4>《维修指南》</EM4>。

斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_maintenance_local_H_desc_001.en:
Down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, the place got utterly smashed in a storm and needs some serious patchwork.

If anyone out there has a <EM4>bunch of fuses</EM4> (I hear <EM4>six</EM4> should be plenty), a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC cans to deal with eight or so messed up pipes</EM4>, we'll hook you up with some creds to do the fix.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
headhunters_maintenance_local_H_desc_001.tr:
<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那破地方被风暴彻底蹂躏了，现在急需大规模修补。

要是有谁带着 <EM4>一堆保险丝</EM4>（听说 <EM4>六个</EM4> 就够用）、<EM4>打捞工具</EM4> 和 <EM4>能修理八根左右破管道的 RMC 罐</EM4>，咱们可以谈笔维修的买卖。

希望你知道该怎么做，不过以防万一，最好瞅瞅你 mobiGlas 日志里的 <EM4>《维修指南》</EM4>。

斯托斯通讯完毕。

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_M_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Need someone to take out a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and deal with the escort ships protecting it. They’ve already interfered with several of our ongoing operations and have become a real problem across several of Eckhart Security cases. Not sure what their endgame is, but it won’t matter once you deal with them.

We’ve let slip that we will be working a job over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which should serve as bait to draw them out. The spot is ideal for an ambush because of the <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that’s a perfect place to power down and hide until you’re ready to strike. If you’re available, the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and its escorts should be passing through soon.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The main contractor will also receive a bonus payment of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_ShipAmbush_M_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：飞船伏击
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

需要有人干掉 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 以及保护它的护航舰队。他们已经干扰了我们好几项正在进行的行动，在埃克哈特安全公司的多个案例中都成了大麻烦。我们不清楚他们的真正目的，但一旦你解决了他们，那就都无关紧要了。

我们已经透露我们将在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 执行一项任务，这应该能吸引他们过来。这个地点非常适合设伏，因为那里有<EM4>辐射云</EM4>，可以让你关闭飞船藏起来，等到行动时机成熟再出击。如果你有空的话，<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 及其护航舰队应该很快就会经过。

合约完成后立即付款。主承包商还能获得 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个雇佣兵凭证</EM4>的额外奖励。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Party_Tim.en:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>8 SCU</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Party_Tim.tr:
嗨，

我猜 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 那帮人是打算要开派对，所以急着凑齐所有东西，你这单得跑好几趟，其中一趟能去尼克斯提点“金克斯金酒”——你没喝过吧？那可是尼克斯的招牌，有人嫌它粉嘟嘟地发光，但我超爱，就爱喝那一口独特的劲道。

以下是取货地点：

取货地点（任意顺序）

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

忘了带个<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>，货箱最大尺寸有 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4>，光靠胳膊可搬不动。


运货顺利，
雷耶斯·玲
货运物流协调员
玲家快递


玲家快递深知宇宙危险莫测，因此制定了多项协议，以保护你和客户货物的安全。为确保你不会因不可控因素受罚，总报酬将按成功交付的货物比例计算。每趟运输都会设置交付倒计时，倒计时结束时仍未交付的货物将被标记为被盗，并按盗窃处理。所有取货和送货必须通过自动装载或货运电梯完成。

LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Fruit_Tim.en:
Hi, 
 
Normally Reyes schedules our hauls, but she’s gone for the day, and I just got a comm inquiring about a simple, direct run from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. The cargo is a load of fruit that will lose its value if it spoils. We don't want to anger this client, so would appreciate it if you knocked this out in a timely manner.  

Here’s some other details you should know. The largest container used is <EM4>2 SCU</EM4>, so don’t forget your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. 

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Fruit_Tim.tr:
嗨，

平时都是雷耶斯安排货运，但她今天不在，我刚接到个消息，说有一单简单的直达运货，从 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>，货是水果，放久了就烂，价值直接归零，我们可不想惹毛这客户。如果你能及时解决这个问题那我将感激不尽。

顺带一提，最大集装箱的尺寸是 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4>，别忘了带个<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>，不然真搬不动。


此致，
佩特拉·玲
货运运营总经理
玲家快递


玲家快递深知宇宙危险莫测，因此制定了多项协议，以保护你和客户货物的安全。为确保你不会因不可控因素受罚，总报酬将按成功交付的货物比例计算。每趟运输都会设置交付倒计时，倒计时结束时仍未交付的货物将被标记为被盗，并按盗窃处理。所有取货和送货必须通过自动装载或货运电梯完成。

LingFamily_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_.en:
Hey, 
 
Any chance you’d be willing to do a haul into Pyro? I know it can get dangerous there but this is for a good cause. A group of new CFP members have moved to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and had a tough time adjusting to life in the system. They all left stuff behind in Stanton, because their transporter didn’t have room, so we’ve been hired to pick it all up and bring it to them.      

Here are the pick ups:   

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)   

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]
- [LOCATION 4] 

CFP leaders hope that bringing them this stuff will make the system feel more like home. Let’s make sure this one goes down smoothly. Remember to equip your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and a ship that can fit <EM4>2 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. 
 

Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_.tr:
嘿，

你愿意跑一单去派罗吗？我知道那地方挺危险，但这事儿真挺有意义的。一群新加入繁荣公民的家伙刚搬去 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>，在星系里过得特别不不适应。他们东西全撂在斯坦顿了，因为他们的运输舱塞不下。我们这回就是去把他们家当全捡回来，送过去。

以下是取货地点：

取货地点（任意顺序）

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

繁荣公民的领导们说，把这些东西送过去，他们才能觉得这地方像家。咱可得把这单干漂亮了。别忘了带上<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>，再找艘能装下 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的船，就稳了。


运货顺利，
雷耶斯·玲
货运物流协调员
玲家快递


玲家快递深知宇宙危险莫测，因此制定了多项协议，以保护你和客户货物的安全。为确保你不会因不可控因素受罚，总报酬将按成功交付的货物比例计算。每趟运输都会设置交付倒计时，倒计时结束时仍未交付的货物将被标记为被盗，并按盗窃处理。所有取货和送货必须通过自动装载或货运电梯完成。

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
Hello,

Looking for a quick job? Got a client who's waiting on a shipment but our hauler ran into some engine trouble. Can't seem to get them up and running so we need someone to take over.

Fly out to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and you'll spot their ship. You can't miss it - it's the one that's sitting still in the middle of space. Make sure you bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> along with a decent ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Once you've picked up the goods take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.tr:
你好，

想找点轻松的工作？有位客户正等着收货，但我们的运输员飞船出了引擎故障，一时半会儿修不好，急需有人接手。

请飞往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，他们的飞船一眼就能认出，就是那艘孤零零停在太空中央的那个。务必带上<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>，以及一艘能装载 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的靠谱飞船。

取货后，将货物送至 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 处的货运电梯。

谢谢，
雷耶斯·玲
货运物流协调员
玲家快递


玲家快递深知宇宙危险莫测，因此制定了多项协议，以保护你和客户货物的安全。为确保你不会因不可控因素受罚，总报酬将按成功交付的货物比例计算。每趟运输都会设置交付倒计时，倒计时结束时仍未交付的货物将被标记为被盗，并按盗窃处理。所有取货和送货必须通过自动装载或货运电梯完成。

Headhunters_Delivery_Outpost_Multi_desc_.en:
Got a bunch of boxes sitting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that have to be moved to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Seems easy enough, right? Well, guess it ain’t. 

The idiot who was supposed to move these things threw out his back trying to carry all of ‘em at once. So, you know, maybe bring a <EM4> handheld tractor beam</EM4> and try taking ‘em one at a time like a normal person. But, hey, don’t let me tell you how to do your job. Just get it done. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_Delivery_Outpost_Multi_desc_.tr:
在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 有一堆箱子需要搬到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。听起来挺简单，对吧？可实际上并没那么容易。

本来负责搬运的那个傻逼试图一次性把所有箱子都扛过去，结果背扭了。所以，你知道的，或许可以带个牵引光束，像个正常人一样一次搬一个。不过，嘿，别让我告诉你怎么做你的工作。把事情办妥就行。带个<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>也是个聪明选择。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

Hockrow_searchbody_space_H_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP65817
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has hired the agency to look for a missing friend who has not been returning their comms and have been acting increasingly erratic. The client has shared all the information they possess on <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and we’ve been able to pinpoint their ship’s location.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and verify the status of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. If they are deceased, examine their body and we will pass the information on to the client.

Additional Notes:
Our scout reported heavy outlaw activity in the vicinity and was forced to retreat, meaning we have designated this as a highly dangerous case.
Hockrow_searchbody_space_H_Desc_001.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP65817
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
一位客户雇佣了我们事务所来寻找一位失踪的朋友，这位朋友已经停止了通讯联系，行为也越来越异常。客户已经提供了他们所掌握的所有关于 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的信息，我们现在已经确定了他们的飞船位置。

合约调查员的行动：
前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，核实 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的情况。如果他们已经死亡，请检查他们的尸体，然后我们将把相关信息报告给客户。

补充说明：
我们的侦察员报告称该地区有大量的不法分子活动，被迫撤退，因此我们将此案件列为高危案件。

Hockcrow_SearchBody_VeryEasy_Description.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP51643
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Looking for an operative to confirm the status of a client. They and their partner missed a scheduled meeting and all attempts to contact them have proven in vain. Last we heard they were undertaking some business in [SYSTEM] and fear that they may be the victim of some unfortunate tragedy.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Be cautious while conducting your search. If the client did meet harm, it would be unfortunate for you to meet the same fate.
Hockcrow_SearchBody_VeryEasy_Description.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP51643
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
需一名行动人员确认某客户当前状态：该客户与其搭档未能如期赴约，且所有联络尝试均告失败。据最后消息，二人此前正在 [SYSTEM] 处理某项事务，我们担忧其或已遭遇不幸事件。

合约调查员的行动：
请前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 找到 <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> 并确认其状态。

若他们已身亡，请仔细检查遗体，以便我们通过您的 mobiGlas 核实死亡情况。

补充说明：
搜索过程中请务必谨慎行事。若客户确已遇害，切勿重蹈覆辙，以免遭遇同样厄运。

Hockcrow_SearchBody_VeryHard_Description.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP12854
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary:
We have been asked to track down two contractors who work for a client of ours after they lost contact with them. They were last known to be traveling together in [SYSTEM]. Until their exact situation can be assessed, our client is stuck in a waiting pattern. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
You'll be heading into what is regarded as a particularly dangerous spot. Backup is highly recommended for this encounter.
Hockcrow_SearchBody_VeryHard_Description.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP12854
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
我们受托追踪两名为我方客户工作的承包商，因其已失联。据最后确认，二人曾一同前往 [SYSTEM]。在确切情况查明前，客户只能被动等待。

合约调查员的行动：
请前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 找到 <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> 并确认其状态。

若他们已身亡，请仔细检查遗体，以便我们通过您的 mobiGlas 核实死亡情况。

补充说明：
您将前往一处公认高度危险的区域，强烈建议带上支援人员协同行动。

Hockcrow_SearchBody_Super_Description_00.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP65648
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A whole crew has gone missing while undertaking a contract in [SYSTEM] for a client that I'm unfortunately not allowed to disclose the full details of to you. Lets just say that it wasn't the safest job and the fact the crew is not responding comms is not surprising but it is concerning. It's vital that we ascertain what happened to them. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
This investigation has high potential for there to be aggressive and dangerous hostiles on site. Arm yourself accordingly and consider bringing other skilled associates with you.
Hockcrow_SearchBody_Super_Description_00.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP65648
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
一整个团队在为某客户执行 [SYSTEM] 合约任务期间失联。遗憾的是，我无法向您透露该客户的完整信息。简而言之，此任务本就风险极高。船员至今未回复通讯虽在意料之中，但仍令人高度担忧。我们需要查明其下落与遭遇实情。

合约调查员的行动：
请前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 找到 <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> 并确认其状态。

若他们已身亡，请仔细检查遗体，以便我们通过您的 mobiGlas 核实死亡情况。

补充说明：
本次调查极可能遭遇具攻击性且危险的敌对目标，请务必配备适当武器，并考虑与其他专业人员协同行动。

Hockcrow_SearchBody_Easy_Description_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP51132
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to help us locate the current whereabouts of a client's employee. They were on assignment in [SYSTEM] but has failed to report in. Our client is beginning to fear the worst.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
This contract has been flagged as <EM4>combat-likely</EM4> so prepare accordingly.
Hockcrow_SearchBody_Easy_Description_001.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP51132
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
需一名特工协助我们定位某客户员工的当前位置。该员工原在 [SYSTEM] 执行任务，但至今未按要求汇报，客户已开始担忧最坏情况。

合约调查员的行动：
请前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 定位 <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> 并确认其状态。

若他们已身亡，请仔细检查遗体，以便我们通过您的 mobiGlas 核实死亡情况。

补充说明：
本合约已标记为<EM4>有战斗风险</EM4>，请务必做好相应准备。

Hockcrow_SearchBody_Hard_Description_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP45648
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has tasked us with tracking down with one of their family members who has gone missing. After exhibiting erratic behavior, they cut off all communications and left for [SYSTEM]. We were able to track down their general whereabouts but need an investigator to head there in person to assess the situation.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
There is a high chance that you will encounter hostiles while conducting your search. We recommend considering bringing along backup to support you.
Hockcrow_SearchBody_Hard_Description_001.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP45648
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
某客户委托我们追踪一名失联的家属成员。该人员此前行为异常，随后切断一切联络，独自前往 [SYSTEM]。我们已大致锁定其位置，现需一名调查员亲赴现场评估实情。

合约调查员的行动：
请前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 定位 <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> 并确认其状态。

若他们已身亡，请仔细检查遗体，以便我们通过您的 mobiGlas 核实死亡情况。

补充说明：
搜索过程中极有可能遭遇敌对目标，我们建议考虑携带支援人员协同行动。

searchbodyspace_desc_M.en:
Whilst we pride ourselves on our efficiency and general cleanliness when it comes to our work, sometimes our contractors can get a little carried away themselves. Circumstances surrounding a former contractor’s death, and more importantly, the target, are somewhat unclear to us.

We’ll need you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body so we can deliver clear confirmation to our client. As for the former contractor… you needn’t concern yourself with them. Arrangements for disposal have already been made.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
searchbodyspace_desc_M.tr:
Whilst we pride ourselves on our efficiency and general cleanliness when it comes to our work, sometimes our contractors can get a little carried away themselves. Circumstances surrounding a former contractor’s death, and more importantly, the target, are somewhat unclear to us.

We’ll need you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body so we can deliver clear confirmation to our client. As for the former contractor… you needn’t concern yourself with them. Arrangements for disposal have already been made.

Sincerely,

Vaughn

Hockrow_searchbody_space_M_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP58235
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Our client has reported a friend of hers has gone missing. They’d apparently racked up a substantial debt with a group of outlaws and the client is worried for their safety.

Contract Investigator Actions:
We’ve received word that <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s ship was last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> looking heavily damaged. Head to the location and investigate their ship. If you can find their body, verify their status and we can drop back to the client.

Additional Notes:
Consider the missing person’s association with outlaws, we advise you to exhibit caution during this investigation.
Hockrow_searchbody_space_M_Desc_001.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP58235
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
我们的客户报告说她的一个朋友失踪了。据推测，这位朋友欠了一群不法分子一大笔债，所以客户非常担心他们的安全。

合约调查员的行动：
我们得知 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的飞船最后一次被看到是在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，当时飞船受损严重。前往该地点调查他们的飞船。如果你能找到他们的尸体，请确认他们的状况，然后我们再回报给客户。

补充说明：
考虑到失踪者与不法分子的关联，我们建议你在调查过程中保持谨慎。

searchbodyspace_desc_VE.en:
Despite having given the client my word that their target has been dealt with, they are disposed to bouts of paranoia, so they require additional digital evidence of their demise.

I’ll need you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and give the corpse a thorough once over. Whilst I’m confident <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> is taken care of, verification via your mobiGlas will hopefully bring some peace of mind to my client.

I can’t imagine you coming across any significant trouble, but in this line of work, some trouble is always to be expected.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
searchbodyspace_desc_VE.tr:
Despite having given the client my word that their target has been dealt with, they are disposed to bouts of paranoia, so they require additional digital evidence of their demise.

I’ll need you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and give the corpse a thorough once over. Whilst I’m confident <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> is taken care of, verification via your mobiGlas will hopefully bring some peace of mind to my client.

I can’t imagine you coming across any significant trouble, but in this line of work, some trouble is always to be expected.

Sincerely,

Vaughn

Hockrow_searchbody_space_VE_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP48597
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Looking for an operative to identify the status of a client’s missing partner. They lost contact with them abruptly during a comm call, so the client assumes the worst. We’re looking to provide them with some closure.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
The sector you're headed to is relatively quiet so I'm guessing that whatever did happen to [TARGET] it wasn't outlaws.
Hockrow_searchbody_space_VE_Desc_001.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP48597
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
我们需要一名调查员来查明客户失踪合伙人的下落。据称在通话，他们突然失去了联系，因此客户担心最坏的情况。我们希望为他们提供一个明确的结论。

合约调查员的行动：
前往 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，位于 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，确认他们的状况。

如果他们已经死亡，请仔细检查尸体，以便我们通过你的mobiGlas设备核实他们的死亡。

补充说明：
你即将前往的区域相对平静，所以我猜对于 [TARGET] 发生的任何事情都与不法分子无关。

Hockrow_searchbody_space_VH_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP66432
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need a skilled operator with combat experience to investigate the last known location of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Their employer hired us to look for they as they were carrying some highly valuable cargo, but the trackers have been disabled and the pilot is no longer responding.

We suspect that outlaws have attacked the ship and seized the cargo for themselves. The client has expressed that they consider the cargo lost but would like to know if the pilot is dead so they can inform their family. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Investigate <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s ship. If you are able to find the pilot’s body, confirm their status so we may inform the client.

Additional Notes:
Backup is highly recommended for this encounter.
Hockrow_searchbody_space_VH_Desc_001.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP66432
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
我们需要一名具有战斗经验的熟练调查员来调查 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的最后已知位置。他们的雇主雇佣我们去找他们，因为他们当时正在运送一些高价值的物资。但是追踪设备已被破坏，飞行员也失去了联系。

我们怀疑不法分子袭击了飞船并抢走了货物。客户表示他们认为货物已经丢失，但希望知道飞行员是否遇难，以便通知他们的家人。

合约调查员的行动：
调查 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，找到 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的飞船。如果能够找到飞行员的尸体，请确认他们的状况，以便我们通知客户。

补充说明：
此次行动强烈建议带上增援。

Hockcrow_SearchBody_Medium_Description_0.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP74384
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
We had sent in a two-person team to [SYSTEM] to investigate a case, but have received no reports from them for several days. At this juncture we are forced to assume that they had run into an unforeseen obstacle and may be in need of rescue, or worse, have been killed.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Consider the dangerous nature of their investigation, there is a very strong chance there will be hostiles on site.
Hockcrow_SearchBody_Medium_Description_0.tr:
霍克罗事务所
案件文档 #MP74384
首席调查员：阿尔肯·马洛

案件摘要：
我们此前曾派遣一支两人小组前往 [SYSTEM] 调查一宗案件，但已连续数日未收到其任何汇报。目前不得不推定，他们可能遭遇了突发障碍，亟需救援。抑或更糟已不幸遇难。

合约调查员的行动：
请前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 找到 <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> 并确认其状态。

若他们已身亡，请仔细检查遗体，以便我们通过您的 mobiGlas 核实死亡情况。

补充说明：
鉴于他们执行的调查任务本身具有高度危险性，现场极有可能存在敌对目标。

Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_Hard_Desc_001.en:
Hi,

Need a reliable contractor to pick up some packages for us and deliver them to their destination.

This route is a longer one so make sure you have enough fuel and don't forget a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

And not sure what you were planning on flying, but you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_Hard_Desc_001.tr:
嗨，

需要一名可靠的承包商为我们取货并把它们送达指定地点。

此航线较长，请确保燃料充足，并务必携带<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>。

然后我不确定你打算怎么飞，但你需要一艘能运输 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的飞船。

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·蒂埃诺
初级物流协调员
科瓦莱什货运
“尽你所需，达你所在。”


科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司，为鼓励及时交付和防止货运欺诈，科瓦莱什货运将设定交货时间限制。到期后，任何未交付的货物将被视为被盗。总酬金将会根据货物成功交付的百分比按比例支付。

headhunters_defendship_multi_SRT_PA_desc.en:
Got ourselves in a real mess here. A Headhunters ship on an important mission got attacked near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Can’t get too into the specifics but it’s absolutely vital that they survive. The People’s Alliance know this too because they’re throwing everything they can at ‘em.

Not gonna pull any punches. This is a serious-ass situation that many wouldn’t survive. If you do, I’ll sing your praises and make sure you’re paid well.   

-Stows
headhunters_defendship_multi_SRT_PA_desc.tr:
我们这下可麻烦大了。一艘执行重要任务的猎头帮飞船在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近遭到了攻击。虽然不能透露太多细节，但他们的生存绝对至关重要。人民联盟也必须知道这件事，因为他们正在倾尽全力对付我们。

我们不会手下留情。这是个非常严重的情况，很多人在这种情况下都活不下来。如果你能成功解决这个问题，我会好好表扬你，而且保证你会得到丰厚的报酬。

-斯托斯

headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_desc_001.en:
Here's the deal. Some of those mercs that CFP hired as security went and shot up some Headhunters that were just moving through the system. They weren't even doing anything, just flying.

Anyway, we tracked them back to [LOCATION] and want to dish out some payback. Grab your gear and be our weapon, we'll make it worth your while.

- Stows
headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_desc_001.tr:
事情是这样的。一些繁荣公民雇佣的安保，竟然对一些只是路过的猎头帮开枪。他们甚至什么都没做，只是在飞行而已。

不管怎样，我们追踪到了他位于 [LOCATION]，我们想报仇。准备好你的装备，充当我们的武器，我们会让你得到回报。

- 斯托斯

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001.en:
I’ve noticed an uptick in attacks on Headhunter ships and it's got me feelin' jumpy. Got an important resupply shipment that we can’t afford to lose, and need help determining what route to send it. I’ve strung together a few potential spots that I’d set up in if I was gonna hit ‘em. Any chance you could visit and clear out any lowlifes that may be hiding there? 

The route starts at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you scan it and clear whatever’s there, I’ll send you to a few other areas that could work. I’ve been hearing people have been rolling through these spots, so would be smart to <EM4>bring a friend</EM4> to watch your back.

You make it to the end and I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>14 Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

- Stows
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001.tr:
最近针对猎头帮飞船的袭击变多了，这让我感到不安。有批重要补给物资经不起闪失，得找人探路清场——我标了几个要是我就肯定会埋伏的点。

从你 HUD 上的<EM4>位置标记</EM4>开始扫荡，完事再发你下个坐标。听说这些地方最近总有杂碎晃悠，所以<EM4>带上个朋友</EM4>掩护你是个明智的选择。

只要你把这事办成，我就给主承包商 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4>作为额外奖励。

- 斯托斯

LocalDelivery_desc.en:
Happy Luminalia!

I have a huge favor to ask. Thanks to some very ill timed maintenance issues, my ship is out of commission for at least a week and I won't be able to finish delivering presents to everyone on my gift list.

Looked into using FTL but with their holiday pricing I'll end up paying more credits than what the gifts cost! 

Figured I would see if you're interested in helping me out. I get my gifts delivered on time and you get some extra Luminalia spending credits. 

The gifts are wrapped and waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Thanks in advance and may your light glow a little brighter this year!

Sincerely,
[GIFTSENDER]

civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_001,.tr:
光灯节快乐！

我要你帮个大忙。我的船因为一些很不凑巧的维护问题，至少有一个星期不能飞，这搞得我没法给名单上的人送礼物了。

我想过叫超光速快递，但根据他们的假日定价，我花在物流上的钱比礼物本身还高!

我想看看你是否有兴趣帮我。我的礼物会按时送到，而你会得到额外的光灯节奖励。

礼物都包好了，放在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 等你了。[DESCRIPTIONSETUP]。

在此先感谢你，并希望今年你的灯光更加明亮！

此致，
[GIFTSENDER]

Covalex_LocalDelivery_desc_01.en:
Hi there!

Just got a local delivery that we need taken care of, if you're available. 

PACKAGE FOR PICK UP
     · Package <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4> from <EM4>[PICKUP1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Package <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4> to <EM4>[DROPOFF1]</EM4>

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

[SIGN_OFF]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. Covalex_LocalDelivery_desc_01.tr:
你好啊！

如果你有时间的话，我们正好有一条本地路线需要配送。

需取件包裹
     · 来自 <EM4>[PICKUP1]</EM4> 的包裹  <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4>

投递地点
     · 把包裹 <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4> 送到 <EM4>[DROPOFF1]</EM4>

顺便提醒，我们强烈建议承包商随身携带<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>。

[SIGN_OFF]

蔡斯·休伊特
初级物流协调员
科瓦莱什货运
“尽你所需，达你所在。”


科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司。科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司。接受本合约，即视您同意了我们的额外补充的“独立工人补充信息指南v.2948.01.29”中所有条款和条件。科瓦莱什货运不对独立承包人履行合约过程中发生的任何损害。

Covalex_LocalDelivery_desc_02.en:
Hello!

Another run popped into my queue and I figured I'd send it your way. Should be a quick little run with a couple stops.

PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER)
     · Package <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4> from the <EM4>[PICKUP1]</EM4>

你好！

我突然收到了一趟配送需求，这应该是送给你的，稍等一会，我很快送到。

需取件包裹（任意顺序）
     · 来自 <EM4>[PICKUP1]</EM4> 的包裹 <EM4>#[ITEM1]</EM4>

初级物流协调员

civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_002.en:
I'm in desperate need of a little Luminalia magic and I hope you're the one to help.

There are some gifts stuck at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that need to be delivered. 

I tried scheduling a pick up but just got notified that they won't be able to make it until after the holidays. Would you be able to take care of the deliveries for me? I'll gladly pay you what I was going to give them.

It shouldn't be too hard.[DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Whatever you decide to help or not, I hope you have a very happy holiday!

- [GIFTSENDER]
civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_002.tr:
我急需一些光灯节的“魔法”，感觉你应该能帮得上忙

在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 有几个礼物需要送一下。

我之前想安排人去取件，但刚接到通知说，他们得等到节后才会上工，你能帮我送一趟吗？我很乐意把原本该给他们的钱付给你。

这应该不是什么难事。[DESCRIPTIONSETUP]。

不论你是否愿意帮忙，我都衷心祝你节日快乐！

- [GIFTSENDER]

civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_003.en:
Hope the holiday season is treating you well.

Mine's been a bit stressful so far. It turns out that I put the wrong delivery address on a handful of gifts and I'm desperately seeking a way to get them delivered on time. 

It would mean so much to me if you could get me out of this jam. 

The presents are at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and will need to be delivered to [DESCRIPTIONSETUP]

Thank you and best holiday wishes,
[GIFTSENDER]
civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_003.tr:
希望节日期间你过得还不错。

我这段时间都挺有压力的。因为我原本有些礼物要送，谁知道地址居然填错了，而我正焦急地在找方法能让它们按时送达。

如果你能帮我解围，那可就太好了。

那些礼物在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 需要送给 [DESCRIPTIONSETUP]。

十分感谢，并祝你佳节愉快，
[GIFTSENDER]

civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_004.en:
I know things get busy around the holidays, but I was reaching out to see if you had any extra time to do a delivery run.

Got a few presents at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> for close friends that I won't be able to deliver myself. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP]

Much appreciated,
[GIFTSENDER]
civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_004.tr:
我知道假期的时候会非常忙，但我不知你是否有空能帮我去送趟东西。

有几个礼物放在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 要给那些我无法当面送去的亲友们。[DESCRIPTIONSETUP]。

非常感谢，
[GIFTSENDER]

UDM_LocalDelivery_desc.en:
Happy Luminalia!

I have a huge favor to ask. Thanks to some very ill timed maintenance issues, my ship is out of commission for at least a week and I won't be able to finish delivering presents to everyone on my gift list.

Looked into using FTL but with their holiday pricing I'll end up paying more credits than what the gifts cost! 

Figured I would see if you're interested in helping me out. I get my gifts delivered on time and you get some extra Luminalia spending credits. 

The gifts are wrapped and waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Thanks in advance and may your light glow a little brighter this year!

Sincerely,
[GIFTSENDER]

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Super_Descriptio.en:
A rival crew was able to get their hands on our delivery routes and now they have one of my cargo ships pinned down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Now the ship’s sitting there being guarded by a full crew of these assholes. They must be waiting for someone to show up with a transport ship, but you’re going to get there first.

Head there with a crew of your own and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to take the goods away. Make sure they’re the best people you got. It’d be a mistake to underestimate these bastards.

Ghost them and bring my cargo back to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll make sure you’re seriously comp’d for this.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Super_Descriptio.tr:
一帮对手摸清了我的送货路线，现在他们把我的一艘货船围在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 了。

那帮混蛋全守着船，肯定在等谁派运输船去接货，所以你得赶在他们前面到。

带齐你的兄弟过去，再拎上<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>，直接把货抢回来，别像我把他们当软柿子。

干掉他们，把货送回 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯，我保证让你赚翻。

- 刺痛

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_De.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of my clients was in the process of transporting some cargo when they came under fire from a group of outlaws. We haven't been able to contact the crew onboard, but trackers indicate the cargo remains intact.

We need a contractor to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, recover the cargo, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. A ship that can store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are essential for this. Presently, we're not detecting any hostiles, but that could change by the time you've arrived.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_De.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：取回货物
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

我的一位客户在运输一批物资途中，突遭一帮不法分子火力袭击。我们目前尚未能联系上船员，但追踪器显示货物仍完好无损。

现需一名承包商立即前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，取回货物并将其送至位于 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯。任务必需一艘能装载 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的飞船，并配备<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>。目前暂未侦测到敌对目标，但你抵达时情况可能已发生变化。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

[LOCATION] 

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

TheCollector_Ships_Ursa_Desc.en: Wikelo branching into ships too. Took a look at Ursa and improved. Bring parts for me and I will make for you. Explore planet better. Go do.
TheCollector_Ships_Ursa_Desc.tr: 维科洛也有涉足飞船领域。看看大熊座，进步了。给我拿零件来，我给你做。更好地探索星球。去做。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsPew.en:
Hello. Know you human like strange metal suit. How about metal suit with ikti? Sorry, ikti is Banu word, you call it 'gun.' 

If want, bring things I say and I will make for you. Gun will shoot. Cause many damage.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsPew.tr:
你好。我知道你们人类喜欢奇怪的金属动力服。那么带 ikti 的金属动力服怎么样？抱歉，ikti 是巴努语，你可以叫他“枪”。

如果你想要的话，把我说的东西带来，我会为你制作。枪可以射击，造成很多伤害。

再见。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_IrrArm.en:
Wikelo had exciting idea during brief work rest. Was thinking about the little glow worms in Pyro and saw armor get changed to look like.

If you get me parts, bring to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and will make for you then you can glow too.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_IrrArm.tr:
维科洛在短暂的工作休息中，有令人兴奋的想法。是在想派罗里的小蠕虫，并看到护甲被改造成看起来像它。

如果你给我零件，带到 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> 然后我将为你制作成这样。你也能发光。

再见。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsJump.en:
Find very fun piece to add to big human suit that let you jump very high. Now you shoot and jump. Exciting.

If you want, bring me these to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>. Will make.

Wikelo
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsJump.tr:
找到一个非常有趣的部件，可以装在大型人类动力服上，让你跳得非常高。现在你能射击又能跳了。令人兴奋。

如果你想要，把这些东西带来 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> 给我。我会制作。

维科洛

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_VoltThwack.en:
You feel like gun not angry enough? VOLT shotgun very powerful, very dangerous, but not scary? Bring to me. Can make very scary and angry.

They respect you then. Bring to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and we make.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_VoltThwack.tr:
你感觉枪不够愤怒吗？VOLT 霰弹枪非常强大非常危险但是不可怕？带来给我。能做得很可怕和愤怒。

他们就会尊敬你。带到 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> 然后我们制作。

再见。

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_ToRuinStatio.en:
Hiya, 

Looking for a hauler willing to make a run to Ruin Station. Know hauls to Pyro can give some people pause, but this is one we do regularly to help supply the station. I’ve also confirmed that everything on the cargo manifest is above board. 

If you’re interested, the cargo is ready for pick up at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.  Make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> otherwise it might be a little rough.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_ToRuinStatio.tr:
嗨呀，

找个运输人员愿意跑一趟废墟空间站。我知道运到派罗的活儿会让有些人犹豫，不过这是我们经常做的任务，主要是给站点供应物资。我也确认过了，货单上的东西全都合法。

如果你感兴趣的话，货物已经在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 准备好装载了。记得带上 <EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4> 和一艘能装得下 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船，不然可能会有点麻烦。
[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·蒂埃诺
初级物流协调员
科瓦莱什货运
“尽你所需，达你所在。”


科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司。为了促进及时交付并防止货运欺诈，科瓦莱什货运会设定一个交货期限，一旦超过这个期限，任何未交付的货物都会被视为被盗并按盗窃处理。总付款会根据成功交付的货物百分比按比例支付。

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_DeliverAll.en:
Hiya, 

Here’s the deal, I need someone good for a special run. We’ve got an important client that’s threatening to take their business elsewhere, because their deliveries are consistently missing cargo. They’re demanding that 100% of the cargo be delivered on this run, or they won’t pay. Since this was before my time and my supervisor wants to show that it won’t happen again, they agreed with this. Anyway, I think you might be a good fit. 

If you’re willing to take that risk too, here are all the pertinent details. The cargo can be collected from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Looks like the largest cargo container you’ll need to handle is <EM4>24 SCU</EM4>, so be sure to bring a ship big enough and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to help you move those containers around.  
 
Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_DeliverAll.tr:
嗨呀，

是这样的，我需要找个靠谱的人来搞一个特殊任务。我们有个重要客户，说他们的货物总是在运送过程中丢东西，现在很不满意，扬言要把生意转到别的地方去。他们这次提了个要求，这一单必须把货物 100% 完整地送到，要不然就不付钱。这事儿发生在我来之前，我的主管想证明以后不会再出这种情况，所以就答应了客户的条件。不管怎样，我觉得你可能是干这活儿的好手。

如果你愿意冒这个险的话，这些就是全部的任务细节。货物可以从 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 这个地方取，然后送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。看起来你需要处理的最大货物集装箱是 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4> 尺寸的，所以一定要带一艘足够大的飞船，还得配备一把<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>来帮你搬运那些集装箱。

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·蒂埃诺
初级物流协调员
科瓦莱什货运
“尽你所需，达你所在。”


科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司。为了促进及时交付并防止货运欺诈，科瓦莱什货运会设定一个交货期限，一旦超过这个期限，任何未交付的货物都会被视为被盗并按盗窃处理。总付款会根据成功交付的货物百分比按比例支付。

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_FromRuinStat.en:
Hey, it’s El. 

Got a client at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, who needs their cargo picked up from Ruin Station. They’ve been waiting there a while and are starting to get a bit impatient. Any chance you could handle this for us? 

You’ll need a ship that can fit <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to be able to move them. 

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_FromRuinStat.tr:
嘿，是我，艾尔。

<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 这边有个客户，他们的货物需要从废墟空间站取过来。他们在那儿已经等了一段时间了，现在有点不耐烦了。你能帮我们搞定这个吗？

你需要一艘能装 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船，还要配一把 <EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4> 才能搬运那些集装箱。

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·蒂埃诺
初级物流协调员
科瓦莱什货运
“尽你所需，达你所在。”


科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司。为了促进及时交付并防止货运欺诈，科瓦莱什货运会设定一个交货期限，一旦超过这个期限，任何未交付的货物都会被视为被盗并按盗窃处理。总付款会根据成功交付的货物百分比按比例支付。

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_FromLevski.en:
Hey there, 

So the People’s Alliance hired us to move a load of cargo from Levski to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Honestly, I’m surprised that they export some of this stuff, but I guess they must sell something to be able to afford everything they import. 

For the run itself, you’ll need a ship that can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the containers. That should be it.  

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,
  
Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_FromLevski.tr:
所以人民联盟雇了我们从列夫斯基运一批货到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。说实话，我挺惊讶他们还出口这些东西的，不过我猜他们得卖点什么才能买得起那么多进口货。

这趟任务的话，你需要一艘能装 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船，还要配一把 <EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>来搬运集装箱。应该就这样了。

[SIGN_OFF]

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_ToLevski.en:
Hi, 

There’s a bunch of cargo at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that needs to be moved to Levski. The People’s Alliance has a standing order for this stuff because they desperately need it, but it’s not easy to get in Nyx. Funny how they don’t want to be part of the UEE but still rely on us for their survival.  

Anyway, you’ll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> to knock this one out. 

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 
 
Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator

嘿，

<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那边有一批货物需要运到列夫斯基去。人民联盟对这批货有长期订单，因为他们急需这东西，但在尼克斯那地方不好弄。有意思的是，他们不想加入 UEE，结果还得靠我们活着。

不管怎样，你需要配一把 <EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4> 和一艘能装得下 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船来完成这个任务。

Covalex_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC.en:
Hi, 

Several Citizens for Prosperity outposts in Pyro need supplies. It seems like we regularly do runs like this for them, but this one looks like it might be a bit riskier. A CFP rep let me know that outlaw activity around these sites has spiked recently, but they desperately need these outposts restocked, so we’re going ahead with the delivery. <EM4>Just a head’s up that you could run into trouble, so come prepared</EM4>.       

All the cargo’s waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and here’s where it’s heading:  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]  

According to the manifest, the largest cargo container you’ll need to deal with is <EM4>16 SCU</EM4>. Aside from that, remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.    

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 
  
Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC.tr:
嗨，

有几个繁荣公民的前哨站位于派罗，它们需要物资。我们经常为他们执行这样的运输任务，但这次看起来可能会有点风险。一位繁荣公民的代表告诉我，这些地区的不法分子活动最近有所增加，不过这些前哨站急需补货，所以我们还是决定继续进行这次交付。<EM4>只是提醒一下，你们可能会遇到麻烦，所以要做好准备</EM4>。

所有货物都已经在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 等着了，接下来它们的目的地是：

卸货地点（任意顺序）

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

根据货物清单，你们需要处理的最大尺寸的集装箱是 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4> 的。除此之外，记得带上一个<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>。

[SIGN_OFF]

Hi, 

Our client took down a Valakkar and processed it into organics. They've got buyers lined up and waiting for the stuff at a few different locations, so I need someone to go to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, grab it all, and then deliver it to the following spots:    

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]  

According to the manifest, the largest cargo container you’ll need to deal with is <EM4>16 SCU</EM4>. Don’t forget to bring your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. Not sure how you’d move this stuff without it.    

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,   

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator

卸货地点（任意顺序）

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

根据货物清单，你们需要处理的集装箱的尺寸最大不超过 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4>。别忘了带上你的<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>。没有它的话，我真不知道你们该怎么搬运这些货物。

BHG_Certification_Super_Desc.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Extreme
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As acknowledgment of your expertise in the craft, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Master Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Extreme-Risk Targets (ERT). These are criminals who travel in sub-capital ships with heavy escorts. This class of bounty only gets assigned to the most experienced of trackers.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend an ERT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
BHG_Certification_Super_Desc.tr:
--------------------------------------------------------
---------------------  赏金合约  ---------------------
--------------------------------------------------------

赏金猎人公会
处理与分配部门

赏金猎人公会已授权一份官方赏金

姓名：[TARGET]
星系：[SYSTEM]
风险评估：极端
最后已知位置：[LOCATION]
已知关联：< 无 >
注意：因为认可您在飞船方面的专业知识，赏金猎人公会希望为您提供获得“大师级赏金猎人执照”的机会。

此执照表明您有资格追踪和逮捕极端危险目标（ERT），他们乘坐次主力舰级别的飞船，有重兵护卫。这些目标仅分配给最有经验的赏金猎人。

您必须成功缉拿这个名为 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的极端危险目标，才能通过认证，他最后一次出现是在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。


赏金猎人公会
追求正义

赏金猎人公会是一个由雇佣兵公会批准的安保服务，根据《外星贸易授权法案》被授权在 UEE 及其以外地区开展行动。

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.en:
Hey El here,

Got a weird one for you. I was checking the delivery stats for the past week and noticed some discrepancies. Seems we have a couple of deliveries marked as fulfilled but the cargo trackers are still showing as active.

One of these is located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> so I was hoping you could fly over and get to the bottom of this. The order says the hauler was using a ship that could carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you have the same. A <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> is a must for this one too.

That cargo needs to be delivered yesterday, so as soon as you've got it take it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll get your payment sorted for you.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.tr:
嘿，我是艾拉，

碰上个怪事，跟你讲一下。我刚核对了上周的送货记录，发现几单对不上。系统显示已签收，可集装箱的追踪器还亮着呢，说明货根本没到。

其中一单就在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，你方便过去瞅瞅到底咋回事不？订单写明原承运飞船能装下 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸的集装箱</EM4>，你得开同规格的船去；另外这活儿必须带上<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>，别省这一步。

这批货早就该送到了，你一拿到手就赶紧送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯那儿，我立马给你把报酬安排上。

[SIGN_OFF]

Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Pyro_M_Disc.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Pyro_M_Disc.tr:
发布：采购订单
地点：<EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

条款*：
舒宾星际目前正在寻找完成另一份采购订单所需的多种材料。我们感谢您在此事上的帮助。

[LOCATION] 要获取这些矿物的详细产地列表，请查阅你的mobiGlas日志中的<EM4>《采矿基础 #2：去哪里采矿》</EM4>。

由于这是一份采购订单而非采矿合约，你需要自备设备，例如<EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>。

等你准备好出售我们所需的材料，请将其存入位于 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯中。

*接受本合约即表示你原意承担与本合约所列工作相关的所有风险，舒宾星际在对任何在合约期间造成的损害概不负责。

舒宾星际目前正在寻求完成另一份精炼材料采购订单。我们非常感谢您在此事上的帮助。

[LOCATION] 要获取这些矿物的详细产地列表，请查阅你的mobiGlas日志中的<EM4>《采矿基础 #2：去哪里采矿》</EM4>。

由于这是一份采购订单而非采矿合约，你需要自备设备，例如<EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>。

*接受本合约即表示你原意承担与本合约所列工作相关的所有风险，舒宾星际在对任何在合约期间造成的损害概不负责。

cfp_maintenance_E_desc_001.en:
Hi,

One of our outposts at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is in need of some light repairs. The folks onsite have estimated that you’ll need <EM4>three fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to fix up to three or so pipes.</EM4>

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks again for your help,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_maintenance_E_desc_001.tr:
你好，

我们在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的一座前哨站需要进行一些简单维修。现场人员估计你需要准备 <EM4>三个保险丝</EM4>、一个 <EM4>打捞工具</EM4>，以及 <EM4>足够修复约三根管道的 RMC 罐子</EM4>。

若需了解更多维修工作事项，请查阅 mobiGlas 日志中 <EM4>《基石开发公司维修指南》</EM4> 条目。

再次感谢你的协助，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

cfp_maintenance_local_E_desc_001.en:
A nearby outpost of ours at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is suffering from some mechanical failures and could use repairing. Our usual technician is off on another job so we're looking to hire an outside contractor.

We will need <EM4>three fuses replaced</EM4> and if you could bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough canisters of RMC to fix around three pipes</EM4> that should take care of the rest.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_maintenance_local_E_desc_001.tr:
我们在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近的哨站出现了机械故障需要维修。由于常规技术员正在执行其他任务，现需外包承包商协助。

需要 <EM4>更换三个保险丝</EM4>，并请携带 <EM4>打捞工具</EM4> 以及 <EM4>足够修复约三根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4> 来处理剩余问题。

维修工作详情请参考 mobiGlas 日志中的 <EM4>《基石开发公司维修指南》</EM4> 条目。

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

cfp_maintenance_M_desc_001.en:
Hello,

We've received word that a devastating storm hit <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which caused some damage to the structures. Our technician on site is still trying to figure out what they can fix but they can’t get everything. If you bring <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair around five pipes</EM4>, we should be able to handle any remaining repairs.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_maintenance_M_desc_001.tr:
您好，

我们获知 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 遭遇了破坏性风暴，导致建筑结构受损。现场技术人员仍在评估可修复范围，但无法处理全部问题。若您能携带 <EM4>六个保险丝</EM4>、一个 <EM4>打捞工具</EM4> 以及 <EM4>足够修复约五根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4>，我们就能完成剩余维修工作。

如需了解更多维修细节，请查阅 mobiGlas 日志中的 <EM4>《基石开发公司维修指南》</EM4> 条目。

谢谢，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

cfp_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.en:
If you happen to be in the area, please read this.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for a qualified mechanic to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> with the required supplies and perform some repairs.

As it stands, you’ll need <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair five pipes or so.</EM4> That should help us get the outpost functional again. We'll compensate you for your time and materials.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.tr:
若您恰好在附近，请阅读这篇文章。

繁荣公民现需要一名合格机械师携带 <EM4>六个保险丝</EM4>、<EM4>打捞工具</EM4> 及 <EM4>足够维修约五根管道的 RMC 罐</EM4> 前往 <EM4> [LOCATION]</EM4> 进行检修。

这些物资将协助恢复前哨站运转。我们将补偿您的时间与材料损耗。

维修细则请参照 mobiGlas 日志中 <EM4>《基石开发公司维修指南》<EM4> 条目。

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

TheCollector_Ships_Starlift_Max_Desc.en: If you want to move many things. Hercules ship, very good for that. Wikelo even know souli back in Protectorate that started to use. Very big. Wikelo can give you similar version if you get what Wikelo need. Look at list and tell me.
TheCollector_Ships_Starlift_Max_Desc.tr: 如果你想移动很多东西。大力神飞船，非常适合。维基洛甚至知道商会早在保护国就开始使用了。非常大。如果你给维科洛需要的东西，维科洛就可以给你类似的版本。看看清单，然后告诉我。
