eckhart_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is reporting trouble near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Based on their comms, it doesn’t sound like an organized, professional attack. Still, we’re paid to provide protection and it’s been requested. 

Need a contractor to fly there and secure the situation.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
eckhart_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：保卫飞船
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

有一位客户报告在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近遇到了麻烦。根据他们的通讯内容，这次攻击似乎并不像是有组织的、专业的行动。不过，我们受雇就是为了提供保护，而且客户也提出了这个请求。

需要一名承包商飞到那里并控制局面。

报酬将在合约顺利完成后支付。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001.en:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. I’ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but I’ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Get this done and I'll toss the main contractor <EM4>4 Council Scrip</EM4> as a thanks.

Stows out.
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001.tr:
猎头帮一直在扩张，但还需要帮助来了解我们的新领地。我得去检查一下我们打算扫描的地点，准备开始行动了。

我这有个侦查任务要跑，先去 HUD 上的<EM4>位置标记</EM4>，后面还有几个要扫的位置，完事儿会实时更新路线。虽说应该没啥麻烦，但咱这行当你也懂的...意外总比明天来得快。

把这事办妥了，我就给主承包商 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4> 当谢礼。

- 斯托斯

Headhunters_DefendLocation_M_Desc_001.en:
Our airspace around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has been compromised. Enemy ships are threatening the base and any of our ships in the area. Gotta put a stop to this immediately, so get your shit in order and get over there. Just get going and I’ll update you with any relevant info on where you’re needed. 
 
If you need any extra motivation, I’m adding a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

- Stows
Headhunters_DefendLocation_M_Desc_001.tr:
我们的 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近的空域已经被敌人入侵了。敌方飞船正在威胁基地，还有我们在这片区域的所有飞船。必须马上阻止他们，所以赶紧收拾好装备，赶过去吧。你先出发，我会随时告诉你需要去哪里支援。

要是你需要点额外的动力，我会给主要承包人加个奖金：<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4>。

- 斯托斯

EckhartSecurity_Defend_E_Desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has intercepted comms between gang members and discovered that they’re planning an attack on <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Now they need our help to ensure the attack isn’t successful.   

Looking for a contractor who can defend the location from this offensive. Don’t have any specifics on the outlaws, but doubt they’re that skilled if our client cracked their comms so easily. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_Defend_E_Desc_001.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：防御地点
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

一位客户截获了帮派成员之间的通讯，发现他们正在计划对 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 进行攻击。现在他们需要我们的帮助来确保攻击不会成功。

寻找能够防御该地点免受此次攻击的承包商。对不法分子没有具体细节，但如果我们的客户如此轻易地破解了他们的通讯，那估计他们没什么大能耐。

报酬将于合约成功完成后发放。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

EckhartSecurity_Mercenary_Intro_Desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Trial - Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Eckhart Security is seeking skilled security professionals to join its ranks. If you believe that you have the disposition and experience to handle a wide variety of security contracts, then we encourage you to prove your proficiency by executing the contract below. 

Outlaws have been aggravating one of our clients by targeting their staff and operations. Based on the pattern established by previous attacks, we believe that these hostile forces will target <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> next. Successfully complete this contract to receive payment and more work opportunities from Eckhart Security. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_Mercenary_Intro_Desc_001.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：试用 - 防御地点
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

埃克哈特安保正在寻找熟练的安保专业人士加入我们的团队。如果你相信自己具备处理各种安保合约的能力和经验，我们鼓励你通过执行以下合约来证明你的专业水平。

不法分子一直在骚扰我们的一位客户，针对他们的员工和业务进行攻击。根据之前攻击所建立的模式，我们认为这些敌对势力将会把 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 作为下一个目标。成功完成此合约可获得报酬，并在将来获得更多埃克哈特安保的工作机会。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

EckhartSecurity_Mercenary_Rehire_Desc_00.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Trial - Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Eckhart Security is continuing to evaluate potential new contractors. According to our records, you’ve previously attempted a trial contract. We understand how demanding and unpredictable this line of work can be, and would like to give you another chance at completing a qualifying contract. 

If interested, report to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ready to defend it from an incoming assault by outlaws. Successfully complete this contract to receive payment and more work opportunities from Eckhart Security.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_Mercenary_Rehire_Desc_00.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：试用 - 防御地点
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

埃克哈特安保正在继续评估潜在的新承包商。根据我们的记录，你之前曾尝试过一份试用合约。我们理解这项工作的要求和不可预测性，并希望再给你一个机会来完成一份合格的合约。

如果有兴趣，请前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，准备好防御即将到来的不法分子的攻击。成功完成此合约可获得报酬，并在将来获得更多埃克哈特安保的工作机会。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001.en:
Headhunters want some intel on what’s happening around territory. We’ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good ol’ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then we’ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>2 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001.tr:
猎头帮要摸清领地周边动向。虽然放了监控卫星，但哪有真人巡逻靠谱。接不接？

要干就去 HUD 上的<EM4>位置标记</EM4>，先扫那片区域，完事再带带你去其他几个情报点。

要是你还缺点动力的话，这单干完主承包商还能拿到 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4> 作为奖励。

- 斯托斯

EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Client has requested a discreet contractor to infiltrate an ASD research site, locate a group of servers, and destroy the information stored on them permanently.

The client was able to share the location of the servers within the facility: the <EM4>Control Center in the Engineering wing</EM4>. The site has officially been shuttered, but there still may be hostile forces there. Be on your guard.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：摧毁服务器
授权代码 = VS-14

需要立即处理

客户要求一名行事谨慎的承包商潜入一个联合科学与开发公司(ASD)的研究站点，找到一组服务器，并永久销毁存储在其中的信息。

客户能够分享设施内服务器的位置：位于<EM4>工程翼楼的控制中心</EM4>。该地点已正式关闭，但仍可能存在敌对势力。请保持警惕。

报酬将于合约成功完成后发放。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

cfp_defendship_Intro_Desc_001.en:
Citizens for Prosperity is in need of pilots with dogfighting experience. If you’re looking to put your skills to the test, I have a mission here for you to try. 

A civilian ship has requested combat support near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head there and show us that you have the skills to excel in these types of missions and we’ll put you to good use.  

Please be aware. This mission is not a training exercise. This is a real encounter, so please do your best to save the ship in distress. 

Good Luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_Intro_Desc_001.tr:
繁荣公民组织正在寻找具有空战狗斗经验的飞行员。如果你想展示自己的技能，这里有一个任务可以给你试试。

有一艘民用飞船在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近请求战斗支援。前往那里，证明你具备执行这类任务的能力，我们会好好利用你的才能。

请注意，这并不是一次训练演习，而是一次真正的战斗。请尽你最大努力拯救那艘处于困境中的飞船。

祝你好运，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_Intro_desc_001.en:
Got an opportunity for someone eager to show off their flying skills. Headhunters have been running afoul of this numbrain flying a<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and we’re gonna put a stop to it once and for all.

You’re gonna help us set a trap for them. See, there’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that they fly by frequently. 

Head there, hide inside the cloud by powering down your ship, and attack the asshole as soon as you see ‘em and other single-seaters dumb enough to fly with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And in honor of this being your first surprise attack for us, there's a bonus of <EM4>1 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_Intro_desc_001.tr:
有个机会适合那些想展示自己飞行技巧的人。猎头帮最近惹上了这个驾驶 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 飞船的蠢货，我们得彻底解决这个问题。

你要帮我们设一个陷阱。你看，<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近有一片<EM4>辐射云</EM4>，他们经常从那里飞过。

你去那里，把飞船的引擎关掉藏在云里，一旦看到他们和其他蠢货一起飞，就立刻发动攻击。第一次攻击就靠你一个人了，但我们会派几艘支援飞船来帮忙完成剩下的工作。

作为为我们完成的首次突袭，完成任务后，主要承包商会得到<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4>的额外奖励。

斯托斯通讯完毕。

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_VE_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients has been the victim of consistent harassment so the time has come to send a clear cease-and-desist message by taking out their prized <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>.  The lowlife in question follows a fairly predictable routine making them susceptible to an ambush. We’ve identified <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> as the ideal spot. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting. 

By the way, the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> often flies alone but is sometimes joined by a friend in a single-seat ship. Neither should give you too much trouble, but we have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_ShipAmbush_VE_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：飞船伏击
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

我们的一个客户一直遭受持续的骚扰，现在是时候通过采取行动来发出明确的停止骚扰信号了，目标就是他们珍贵的 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>。那个卑鄙的人有着相当可预测的行踪，这使得他们很容易成为伏击的目标。我们已经确定了 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 作为理想的伏击地点。那里有一片<EM4>辐射云</EM4>，你可以在那里关闭飞船隐藏等待时机。

顺便说一下，<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 通常独自行动，但有时也会有一个朋友乘坐单座飞船同行。他们两个应该不会给你带来太大麻烦，不过在你发动攻击后，我们还有其他承包商可以在附近提供帮助。

合约完成后立即付款。主承包商还能获得 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个雇佣兵凭证</EM4>的额外奖励。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_HeavyUtil.en: You need utility suit. Good for work. If you like, Wikelo can make shinier. Look real good. See what Wikelo need and bring.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_HeavyUtil.tr: 你需要工作服。干活用，挺好。要是你想，维科洛能让它更闪。看起来很棒。看看维科洛要什么你带来。

cfp_defendship_MRT_desc_001.en:
A Citizens for Prosperity affiliated ship was attempting to deliver some supplies to [LOCATION] when they were attacked by the recipients who didn't want to pay for their purchase and chose violence instead.

I'll instruct our traders to be more careful about who they deal with in the future, but for now, I would really appreciate you lending them a hand in fighting off these attackers. 

Appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_MRT_desc_001.tr:
一艘隶属于繁荣公民的飞船正在尝试将一些物资送往 [LOCATION]，却遭到了不想付钱的收件人的攻击，他们选择了暴力。

我会指示我们的商人在未来更注意合作对象，但目前我非常感谢你能帮他们抵御这些攻击者。

谢谢，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_E_desc.en:
My boss is looking for an available hitter. Headhunters are looking to retake [LOCATION]. The CFP Mercs there have been digging in for a long fight. Look, we don't want to kill anyone we don't have to, so we're looking into other options.

Security there's being run by [TARGET] and my Judge thinks that if they're taken out, the rest'll scatter. Shedding a little blood's better than a lot, right?

-Stows
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_E_desc.tr:
我老大在找一个可以出手的雇佣兵，猎头帮正打算重新夺回在 [LOCATION]。那里的佣兵已经准备好进行一场漫长的战斗。听着，我们不想杀任何非杀不可的人，所以我们在寻找其他路子。

那里的安保由 [TARGET] 负责，我的判断是如果他被解决掉，其他人就会四散而逃。流一点血总比流很多好，对吧？

- 斯托斯

Headhunters_EliminateAll_PAF_H_desc_001.en:
Word’s gotten out that we’re expanding into Stanton and a local crew has hit a few of our safe houses. We managed to track the bastards back to some old Hathor mining site. 

You up for showing them how the Headhunters handle things? If so, head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and show them that we mean business. 

 
- Stows
Headhunters_EliminateAll_PAF_H_desc_001.tr:
看来消息已经传开了，我们在斯坦顿的扩张行动已经引起了注意。当地的团伙在派罗跳跃点蹲守，然后尾随我们的飞船袭击我们的安全屋。上次袭击中有几个人幸存下来，成功跟踪袭击者回到了一个老旧的哈索尔采矿站。

你准备好展示猎头帮的处事方式了吗？如果是的话，前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，把那里的一切活物清除干净。

斯托斯

headhunters_sabotage_generators_VE_desc_.en: This is a fairly straightforward job. We got some assholes at [LOCATION] who have been thinking they're better than they are. Go and shut off their power to remind them that Headhunters are in charge.\n\n-Stows out
headhunters_sabotage_generators_VE_desc_.tr: 这是一项相当简单的工作。在 [LOCATION] 有些家伙自以为是，自以为了不起。去给他们拉个闸，让他们知道猎头帮才是主宰。\n\n- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

Headhunters_SabotageRelays_CFP_001_Desc.en:
CFP think they’re safe over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> but we got big plans for them. You’re gonna pave the way for us by heading there and shutting down their comm towers.

There should be a <EM4>control terminal at the top</EM4> that you can use to shut the tower down. You get that sorted and they won’t be able to call for backup. Then we can show those skags who this system belongs to.

Most outposts use the same system, so this’ll come in handy next time you want to make sure reinforcements don’t mess with you.

Stows out.
Headhunters_SabotageRelays_CFP_001_Desc.tr:
繁荣公民以为他们躲在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 就安全了，但我们早就给他们准备了大礼。你先过去把他们的通讯塔统统关掉，给我们铺平道路。

塔顶应该有个<EM4>控制终端</EM4>，你可以用它来关闭通讯塔。只要搞定这个，他们就别想叫援兵了。到时候我们就好好让那些渣渣知道，这个星系到底是谁的地盘。

大多数前哨站都用同样的系统，所以下次你想确保没人来打扰你的时候，这招就派得上用场了。


斯托斯通讯完毕

CFP_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc.en:
Citizens for Prosperity are eager to help the people of Pyro, and it starts with freeing them from the grasp of XenoThreat.

We’re preparing a team to infiltrate one of their outposts, but we need someone to go in ahead to take out their communication towers first. Once those towers are offline, they won’t be able to call for reinforcements and we can proceed with our plan.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and find the towers. At the <EM4>top is a control panel</EM4> that can be used to disable them.

Also, it’s worth noting that most outposts use a similar system, so you’ll know how to disable the comms towers rather than risk fighting reinforcement dropships when you’re doing other jobs.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc.tr:
繁荣公民渴望帮助派罗的人民，而这一切都要从把他们从异种威胁的魔爪中解救出来开始。

我们正在准备一支小队渗透进他们的一个前哨站，但需要有人先行潜入摧毁他们的通讯塔。只要那些塔一瘫痪，他们就无法呼叫增援，我们就能顺利推进计划了。

前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 找到通讯塔。塔顶有一个控制面板，可以用来关闭它们。

另外，值得注意的是，大多数前哨站都使用类似的系统，所以你会知道如何关闭通讯塔，而不是在执行其他任务时冒险与增援运输船作战。

祝你好运，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

Headhunters_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc.en:
We’re making a play to hit some XenoThreat assholes where it hurts but need to be smart about it. That’s why we’re sending you in first to take out their comm towers so they can’t call for backup. You do that and we can be in and out before they know it.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and climb the comm towers there. Should be a <EM4>control panel at the top</EM4> you can use to switch them off.

In fact, same goes for most other outposts. Rather than having to deal with reinforcements, you can just turn off the comm towers. But hey, if you wanna ring the bell to ghost a few more Xenothreat I ain’t complaining.

Stows out.
Headhunters_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc.tr:
我们打算给那些异种威胁的混蛋来点狠的，但得聪明点动手。所以先派你进去，把他们的通讯塔干掉，让他们没法叫援兵。你搞定之后，我们就能神不知鬼不觉地进出。

前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，爬上那里的通讯塔，塔顶应该有个<EM4>控制面板</EM4>，你可以用它把塔关掉。

其实大多数前哨站都这样，与其等他们援军来烦你，不如直接把通讯塔关了省事。不过话说回来，要是你想敲个钟多引几个异种威胁出来遛遛，我也不拦着。


斯托斯通讯完毕

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_E_desc_001.en:
Any interest in taking out a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> for us? 

Shouldn’t be too much trouble. We’ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and you’ll get a good jump on ‘em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. We’ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_E_desc_001.tr:
有兴趣帮我们解决掉 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 吗？

应该不会太麻烦。我们已经踩好点了，发现他们很快就会经过 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。你只需要藏在附近的辐射云里，就能打他们个措手不及。

目标可能是单枪匹马或带着几个帮手，都是单座战机但空战能力不俗。等交火开始后，我们会派些人手过去支援。

你要是能把这事儿办成了，我会给主承包商 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4> 作为报酬。

- 斯托斯

headhunters_killship_gen_lrt_desc_001.en:
Got another scumbag who needs their ticket punched. [TARGET] is just a low level thug who doesn't seem to learn. We've warned them to either throw in with us or move system, but they don't seem to be listening so we're out of patience.

Head to [LOCATION] and you should find [TARGET] flying around. 

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_gen_lrt_desc_001.tr:
又有一个混蛋需要被处理了。[TARGET] 只是个低级小混混，似乎一点都不懂得吸取教训。我们已经警告过他们，要么加入我们，要么离开这个星系，但他们似乎没有在听，所以现在我们已经失去耐心了。

 前往 [LOCATION]，你应该能找到 [TARGET] 在附近飞行。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
Hiya,

I've got a client who's been messaging me all morning about a shipment they were supposed to receive and when I checked up on the cargo it turns out that it's sitting completely still in the middle of space.

This is obviously bad for a number of reasons, and not just because I had to spend 20 minutes getting yelled at. Can you head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and see what happened? The original contract called for a ship that could carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you've got that and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

Once you've got the cargo, can you make sure it's delivered to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>? Thanks a bunch.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.tr:
你好，

我有个客户一早上都在给我发消息，问他们本该收到的那批货去哪儿了。我查了下货物状态，结果发现它正孤零零地停在太空中间一动不动。

这事儿明显很糟，原因不止一个，尤其我还被骂了整整 20 分钟。你能去 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那儿看看到底出了啥状况吗？原合同要求用一艘能装下 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的飞船，所以你得确保自己有这个运载能力，还得配个<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>。

等你拿到货后，记得把它送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 那儿的货运电梯哈，多谢啦！

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·蒂埃诺
初级物流协调员
科瓦莱什货运
“尽你所需，达你所在。”


科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司，为鼓励及时交付和防止货运欺诈，科瓦莱什货运将设定交货时间限制。到期后，任何未交付的货物将被视为被盗。总酬金将会根据货物成功交付的百分比按比例支付。

Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Nyx_M_Plane.en:
CONTRACT: Mining Order
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
One of our prospecting teams recently confirmed that the asteroids which house QV Breaker Stations throughout Nyx's Keeger Belt contain a rare ore type, Sadaryx.

However, owing to the difficulty in access these stations and the inherent risks involved, we are seeking external mining crews to handle the extraction.

We do not have a confirmed location of where the Sadaryx deposits are located within the station, but would recommend starting with the cave sections where minerals naturally form. If you get really lucky, you may even find some crystals in storage that were mined by the old QV work crews.

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
Your crew will need to gain access to a <EM4>QV Breaker Station</EM4>, collect the required <EM4> Sadaryx ore</EM4>, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This will require a <EM4>Multi-Tool with a Mining Attachment</EM4> and a basic understanding of hand mining.

Our prospecting teams have reported that these stations may have been infiltrated by outlaws. Caution is advised.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Nyx_M_Plane.tr:
合约：采矿订单
地点：尼克斯星系

详情：
我们的一支勘探小队近期确认，位于尼克斯星系基格小行星带中，设有 QV 碎岩站的小行星内部蕴藏一种稀有矿石“萨达瑞晶(Sadaryx)”。

然而，由于这些站点难以抵达，且作业本身风险极高，我们现面向外部采矿队伍招募执行开采任务。

目前尚无法确定萨达瑞晶矿石在站点内的具体分布位置，但建议优先从天然矿物富集的洞穴区域入手。若运气极佳，你甚至可能在仓储区发现由旧时 QV 作业组开采并留下的晶体矿藏。

<EM4>条款*：</EM4>
你的船员需进入<EM4> QV 碎岩站</EM4>，采集指定的<EM4>萨达瑞晶</EM4>，并将其运送至位于 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯处。

此项任务需配备装有采矿附件的<EM4>多功能工具</EM4>，并具备基础的手动采矿技能。

我方勘探小队报告称，这些站点可能已被不法分子渗透，请务必谨慎行事。

*接受本合约即表示你原意承担与本合约所列工作相关的所有风险，舒宾星际在对任何在合约期间造成的损害概不负责。

Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Intro_Local.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TECH PREVIEW TESTING:
Complete this mission to get blueprints for Volt weapons. For this test, these blueprints have some slots that accepting different materials for varying stat adjustments.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract."
Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Intro_Local.tr:
发布：采购订单
地点：<EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

技术预览测试：
完成此任务以获取 Volt 武器的蓝图。在本次测试中，这些蓝图包含若干插槽，可接受不同材料以获得不同的属性调整。

[LOCATION] 要获取这些矿物的详细产地列表，请查阅你的 mobiGlas 日志中的<EM4>《采矿基础 #2：去哪里采矿》</EM4>。如果你需要复习如何获取这些材料，也可以顺便阅读第一部分<EM4>《采矿基础 #1：基本概述》</EM4>。

由于这是一份采购订单而非采矿合约，你需要自备设备，例如<EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>。

等你准备好出售我们所需的材料，请将其存入位于 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯中。

*接受本合约即表示你原意承担与本合约所列工作相关的所有风险，舒宾星际在对任何在合约期间造成的损害概不负责。"

Shubin_Industrial_ShipMining_Nyx_E_Local.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of refined materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. TheCollector_Ships_F8C_Stealth_Desc.en: Have the pieces to build useful ship for people who like to sneak then fight. Take F8C ship and make even better. Have put what Wikelo will need to build for you. Now you decide. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_F8C_Stealth_Desc.tr: 为那些喜欢先偷袭再战斗的人建造有用的船。乘坐 F8C，做得更好。已经放了维科洛给你做好的东西。现在你来决定。再见。

TheCollector_Ships_Starfighter_Ion_Desc.en: Starfighter Ion good ship, but it could be more sneak, yes? Surprise your not friends when you shoot them. I help with this for you. I need the right items and then I can give to you. Bring to me. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Starfighter_Ion_Desc.tr: 星际战斗机离子光好飞船，但它可以更鬼鬼祟祟，对吧？当你射击他们时让不是你朋友的感到惊讶。我帮你做这个。我需要正确的东西，然后我可以给你。带来给我。再见

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_ZipZap.en:
Want to shoot long away and stay hiding. But it snowing? Wikelo have gun for you.

Bring things. I give.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_ZipZap.tr:
想要远距离射击并且保持隐藏。但是下雪了？维基洛有枪给你。

带东西来。我给你。

再见

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.en:
The local Clip wants current intel on several of our sectors. Not sure what they’re looking for but I’m not about to ask. My job is to find someone willing to swing through and scan these locations. You available? 

All you need to do is head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD, run a scan, and if it’s clear, move to the next spot. If you run into any issues, take care of it. 

Ain’t sound too tough now does it? Plus, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.tr:
本地金主需要关于咱们地盘的最新情报。不清楚他们在找什么，但我可不打算问太多。我的任务是找个愿意跑一趟、扫描这些地点的人。你有空吗？

你只需要前往 HUD 上的<EM4>位置标记</EM4>，进行扫描，如果一切正常，就继续前往下一个点。</EM4> 如果遇到任何问题，自行解决就行。

这差事听着不赖吧？另外，为了表示感谢，我会给主承包商额外 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4> 作为奖励。

- 斯托斯

Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_Super_Desc_001.en:
Got a special assignment - Loads of packages ready to delivered across the system. Its a bit more than the usual so I'm only reaching out to my best contractors for this one.

Obviously, a part of that payment will be to cover your fuel because you'll be going super far with this one. You'll need all the usual as well like a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with space to store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Good luck. I'm counting on you.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_Super_Desc_001.tr:
这是一次特殊任务 - 星系内大量包裹等待运输，比平时多一点，所以这次我只联系我最好的承包商。

显然，报酬中已包含燃料补贴，因本次航程极远。除常规装备外，你还需配备<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>，并驾驶一艘可容纳 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的飞船。

祝你好运，我就指望你了。

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·蒂埃诺
初级物流协调员
科瓦莱什货运
“尽你所需，达你所在。”


科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司，为鼓励及时交付和防止货运欺诈，科瓦莱什货运将设定交货时间限制。到期后，任何未交付的货物将被视为被盗。总酬金将会根据货物成功交付的百分比按比例支付。

TheCollector_Ships_Idris_Desc.en: Since Wikelo has done good business with you, make you this very special trade. Idris is a powerful ship perfect for big important person like you. Wikelo has even done mod to make it more dangerous! Bring me a few items and the ship is yours.
TheCollector_Ships_Idris_Desc.tr: 因为维科洛跟你做了不少好买卖，所以给你这个特别的交易。伊德里斯是一艘强大的飞船，非常适合像你这样重要的人物。维科洛甚至给它做了改装，让它更危险！带几个东西给我，这艘船就归你了。

Shubin_Industrial_ShipMining_VH_Org_Desc.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. This purchase order is more complex than typical, requiring multiple mining methods, but since you've proven your skill thus far, we think you and your team are up for the challenge.

Reminder, <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
Shubin_Industrial_ShipMining_VH_Org_Desc.tr:
发布：采购订单
地点：<EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

条款*：
舒宾星际目前正在寻求完成另一份精炼材料采购订单。这份订单比通常的更复杂，需要多种采矿方法，但鉴于你到目前为止已证明了自己的能力，我们认为你和你的团队能够胜任这项挑战。

提醒一下，所有<EM4>材料必须在交付前进行精炼</EM4>，并且由于这是一份采购订单而非采矿合约，你需要自备设备，例如<EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>。

等你准备好出售我们所需的材料，请将其存入位于 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯中。

*接受本合约即表示你原意承担与本合约所列工作相关的所有风险，舒宾星际在对任何在合约期间造成的损害概不负责。

CFP_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.en:
I wouldn't normally ask someone to do something so risky, but these are exceptional circumstances.

Our pilot was transporting some vital cargo when they were targeted by a group of outlaws. Under no circumstances can we allow them to get their hands on the cargo.

With the size of the hostile force who attacked, you won't be able to do this on your own, you'll need to bring a skilled crew with you to  <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> in order to  take out these outlaws and get the cargo back. Make sure at least one of you has a ship that can store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

If by some miracle you can get that cargo back, take it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

It's a lot to ask, but if you can pull this off you'll have my and the whole organizations appreciation.

Best of luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.tr:
我本不该让别人冒这么大的风险，但眼下情况特殊。

我们的飞行员在运送一批关键货物时，遭到了一伙不法分子的袭击。无论如何，绝不能让他们得手。

鉴于袭击者规模庞大，单凭你一人无法完成任务。你必须带上一支技术过硬的队伍，前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，击溃这批不法分子并夺回货物。请确保队伍中至少有一人驾驶的飞船能装载 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸的集装箱</EM4>，并配备一把 <EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>。

倘若奇迹发生、你真能把这批货物抢回来，请将其运至 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯处。

这要求确实很高，但若你能成功，我本人及整个组织都将对你深表感激。

祝你好运，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

TheCollector_Ships_Spirit_C1_Desc.en: Wikelo love useful cargo ship. Spirit is very useful. If you want one, can make for you. Just bring me things and I will do. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Spirit_C1_Desc.tr: 维科洛爱有用的货船。星灵非常有用。如果你想要，我可以给你做。给我带点东西，我就去做。再见。

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.en:
We’re getting pushback from folks who don’t seem happy that we’re here. Folks have gotten keen to our haunts and started sending out squads to hit our ships. You down to visit a few of those spots to show that we won’t be scared off? 

If so, start by seeing what’s around the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there I’ll guide you to a few other hotspots that we need checked. Better get your shit in order before heading out. I'd recommend loading up on ammo and convincing <EM4>two friends</EM4> to join the patrol.

You do this for the Headhunters and I'll see to it that the main contractor gets a bonus of <EM4>18 Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.tr:
有些人不爽咱们在这儿混，专门派小队搞咱们的船。敢不敢去几个据点让他们明白——猎头帮可不是吓大的？

从 HUD 上的<EM4>位置标记</EM4>开始侦查，完事带你去点其他几个火药桶。出发前最好把家伙事儿备齐。我建议你多带点弹药，再拉上<EM4>两个朋友</EM4>一起参与巡逻。

给猎头帮办成这事儿的话，我保证让主承包商多拿 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4> 当外快。

- 斯托斯

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Medium_Desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Looking for a competent contractor who can salvage a messy situation. A client's trusted pilot apparently wasn't so trustworthy and made off with a shipment. But thankfully our trackers are reporting the shipment's static for the moment, waiting to be picked up. If we play our cards right, there's still time to resolve this.

The abandoned ship is located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and will need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the goods. A ship that can handle <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> is a necessity, and expect contact from whatever outlaws this double-crossing pilot was hoping to sell to. 

Once recovered, deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Medium_Desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：取回货物
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

正在寻找一名能妥善处理混乱局面的靠谱承包人。一位受到客户的信任飞行员显然并不值得信赖，竟携带一批货物潜逃了。不过万幸的是，我们的追踪器显示这批货目前处于静止状态，正等着被取走。只要我们行动得当，还有机会及时解决此事。

那艘被抛弃的飞船位于 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，需配备<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>才能搬运货物。必须使用能装载 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的飞船。另外别忘了，那个叛变的飞行员原本打算把货卖给某些不法分子，他们很可能会找上门来。

成功取回之后，请将其送至 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 处的货运电梯。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

TheCollector_Ships_Starfighter_Inferno_D.en: Starfighter Inferno good ship, but what if you want it to be better ship at fighting? Wikelo knows just what to do. You bring me the items and I make it for you. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Starfighter_Inferno_D.tr: 星际战斗机地狱火好飞船，但如果你想要它成为更好的战斗飞船？维科洛正好知道做什么。你带给我东西，我就帮你做。再见

TheCollector_Ships_Crusader_A2_Desc.en: Bring Wikelo the things and I make you A2 Starlifter that fights better. Does war so good make you call it A1! Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Crusader_A2_Desc.tr: 带来维科洛的东西并且我制造你 A2 星际运输船，它战斗更好。它打仗如此之好让你称它 A1！再见。

Foxwell_Mercenary_Rehire_desc_001.en:
Due to a corporate restructuring, Foxwell has some new vacancies that need to be filled immediately. Foxwell knows you’ve previously expressed interest in this line of work, and we’re wondering if you would want to take another crack at a contract.

One of our clients needs support at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> where their security forces are struggling to handle an outlaw incursion. Head there and help the local forces get rid of the problem before it’s too late. 

Successfully complete this contract, and Foxwell would be happy to send more work your way.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_Mercenary_Rehire_desc_001.tr:
由于公司重组，福克斯韦尔有一些急需填补的新职位空缺。福克斯韦尔知道你之前曾对这类工作表示过兴趣，我们想知道你是否愿意再次尝试一份合约。

我们的一位客户在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>需要支援，那里的安保部队难以应对不法分子的入侵。前往那里，帮助当地部队在问题失控之前解决它。

成功完成这份合约，福克斯韦尔将很乐意为你提供更多工作机会。

马库斯·克伦
福克斯韦尔安保
“安全，尽在掌握”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得 UEE 全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们始终欢迎新的干员加入我们的大家庭。如果您或您认识的任何人对此感兴趣，请与我们的合约代表联系。

Headhunters_HaulCargo_AToB_PAF_Illegal_d.en:
I won’t bore you with the details, all you need to know is: one of our haulers got attacked and now our goods are sitting in a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Up to you how you get the goods out, but if you happen to ghost a few of our rivals in the process, I ain’t complaining. Once you’ve got the stuff take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, then we can sort your payment. 

A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_HaulCargo_AToB_PAF_Illegal_d.tr:
我不想给你啰嗦细节，你只需要知道，我们的一个货运员遭到袭击，现在我们的货物正放在 <EM4>[LOCATION] 的货运电梯</EM4>上。

怎么把货物拿出来就看你了，但如果在这个过程中顺便解决掉几个竞争对手，我也不会抱怨。一旦你拿到货物，就把它送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION] 的货运电梯</EM4>上，然后我们可以给你发报酬了。

带个<EM4>手持式牵引光束</EM4>也是个聪明选择。

斯托斯通讯完毕。

Headhunters_DefendLocation_VH_Desc_001.en:
Looking for someone who can not only dogfight but recruit others to the Headhunters cause. Our operations center at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, along with any ships going to and from it, are being targeted by hostile forces. We need support there pronto. 

Not gonna lie, but there’s lots of heat around there. That’s why you’ll need to be fully supplied and find some trustworthy friends to fly at your wing. When you get your crew together, head out there and I’ll update you if there’s any flare ups in the area that need your attention.

This op needs to go off without a hitch, so I’m offering the main contractor a bonus <EM4>18 Council Scrip</EM4> for a job well done. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_DefendLocation_VH_Desc_001.tr:
我们需要的不仅是能进行空中缠斗的人，还要能招募其他人加入猎头帮的事业。我们的行动中心位于 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，所有进出那里的飞船都遭到了敌对势力的袭击。我们急需支援。

说实话，那边的情况很棘手，敌人的火力很猛。所以你得确保物资充足，再找几个信得过的朋友跟你一起飞。等你组好队伍，出发过去，如果那边有任何突发情况，我会及时通知你。

这次行动必须万无一失，所以我打算给完成任务的主要承包人额外奖励 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4>。

斯托斯通讯完毕。

eckhart_defendship_MRT_desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A high-profile client decided to tour Nyx system but got jumped by hostile ships around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Sounds like they’re overwhelmed. Any chance you could head to their location and provide support? 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
eckhart_defendship_MRT_desc_001.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：保卫飞船
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

一位知名客户决定游览尼克斯星系，但在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近遭到敌对飞船的袭击。

听起来他们陷入了困境。你能不能前往他们的位置提供支援？

报酬将在合约顺利完成后支付。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

eckhart_defendship_multi_VHRT_desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Despite our warnings, a client decided to fly to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Unsurprisingly, they just dropped a rescue beacon in the area, so we’re looking for a contractor to get on site, assess the situation, and hopefully rescue the client.

We warned them that extremely dangerous and well-equipped outlaws often strike ships there. That’s exactly what I assume happened here, so make sure you plan accordingly.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
eckhart_defendship_multi_VHRT_desc_001.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：保卫飞船
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

尽管我们发出了警告，但一位客户还是决定飞往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。不出所料，他们刚刚在该地区释放了一个求救信号，因此我们正在寻找一位承包商前往现场，评估情况，并希望能救出客户。

我们之前就警告过他们，那里经常有装备精良的不法分子袭击飞船。我认为这里发生的情况正是如此，所以请务必做好相应的准备。

报酬将在合约顺利完成后支付。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

headhunters_bombingrun_sabotage_servers_.en:
When will people learn that they can't just do whatever they feel like on Headhunter turf? These idiots are planning a big job and thought that I'd just let them get away with it? No way in hell.

I want you to fly to [LOCATION] and destroy their fuel tanks and data servers. Show them what the Headhunters really think of them.

Let's see them try to pull off anything after that.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_sabotage_servers_.tr:
人们什么时候才能明白，他们不能在猎头的地盘上随心所欲？这些白痴正在策划一项大工程，还以为我会让他们逍遥？绝对不可能。

我想让你飞往 [LOCATION]，摧毁他们的燃料罐和数据服务器。让他们看看猎头们对他们的真实看法。

让我们看看他们在那之后还能怎么做。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_bombingrun_M_desc_001.en:
Feels like everyone wants a piece of our pie these days. Scouts are reporting that <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is crawling with some new gang who've got it in for us.

So let's show them why you don't mess with us. Take out their fuel stores and leave them stranded.

That oughta send a message.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_M_desc_001.tr:
最近感觉谁都想来分我们一杯羹。侦察兵报告说 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那边窜出来一帮新帮派，专门跟我们过不去。

那咱们就让他们知道为啥不该惹我们。端掉他们的燃料贮藏，把他们搁浅。

这绝对能给他们长点记性。

-斯托斯通讯完毕

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Super_Descriptio.en:
Hey,

Just our luck that we land one of the biggest contracts of our life and our hauler's engines seize up. They've tried their best to fix it but seems like it's just not happening.

Can you fly out to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and grab the cargo for us? It's really important that we show our client that we're just as reliable as the other big players out there.

Just so you know this is a large shipment. You'll need a ship that can handle <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Once you've transferred it to your ship, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll send confirmation to the client.

Considering the circumstances, we're paying above market rates to whoever can complete this.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Super_Descriptio.tr:
嘿，

真够背的，我们刚拿下这辈子最大的一单，结果运输船引擎直接卡死了。他们拼了命修，但看样子还是没戏了.

你能飞去 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 帮我们把货带回来吗？这事儿真挺关键的，客户得看到我们跟那些大厂一样靠谱。

顺便说下，这单货量不小，你得开艘能装下 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 尺寸集装箱</EM4>的大船，再带上一个<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>才搬得动。等你把货挪到自己船上，直接送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 那儿的货运电梯就行，我们立马给客户发确认。

考虑到现状，谁能干完这个活，我们给的钱绝对比市场价高不少。

谢谢，
雷耶斯·玲
货运物流协调员
玲家快递


玲家快递深知宇宙危险莫测，因此制定了多项协议，以保护你和客户货物的安全。为确保你不会因不可控因素受罚，总报酬将按成功交付的货物比例计算。每趟运输都会设置交付倒计时，倒计时结束时仍未交付的货物将被标记为被盗，并按盗窃处理。所有取货和送货必须通过自动装载或货运电梯完成。

Shubin_Rockcracker_CollectLenses_Desc_00.en:
CONTRACT: Manufacturing Order
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
If you happen to have any other work bringing you to one of the QV Breaker Stations in the Keeger Belt, Shubin Interstellar would be highly interested in contracting you to obtaining a supply of hard-to-source mining laser focus lenses.

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
While there may be some focus lenses that can be recovered from the QV Breaker Station's storage, you must likely will need to manufacture them using <EM4>Sadaryx crystals</EM4> and the on-site lens fabricator. While the ore is rare, these Breaker Stations typically have sadaryx veins that can be mined directly with a <EM4>Multi-Tool with a Mining Attachment</EM4>.

Deliver the procured lenses to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for processing.

Contractors have reported that these stations may have been infiltrated by outlaws, so caution is advised.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
Shubin_Rockcracker_CollectLenses_Desc_00.tr:
合约：制造订单
地点：尼克斯星系

详情：
倘若您恰巧因其他工作需前往基格小行星带的任意一个 QV 碎岩站，舒宾星际公司非常乐意委托您顺带获取一批难以获取的采矿激光聚焦透镜。

<EM4>条款*：</EM4>
尽管部分聚焦透镜或可从 QV 碎岩站的仓储区回收，但您很可能仍需利用<EM4>萨达瑞晶</EM4>，并借助站点内的透镜制造器自行生产。尽管该矿石稀有，但这些碎岩站通常蕴藏可直接用带采矿附件的<EM4>多功能工具</EM4>开采的萨达瑞晶矿石。

请将获取到的透镜运送至位于 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯处，以供后续处理。

据承包商反馈，这些站点可能已被不法分子渗透，请务必保持警惕。

*接受本合约即表示你原意承担与本合约所列工作相关的所有风险，舒宾星际在对任何在合约期间造成的损害概不负责。

eckhart_defendship_LRT_desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients got the brilliant idea to test their dogfighting skills in a real world scenario. Doesn’t sound like it’s going well, because they comm’d us asking for some support. 

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and help clean up the mess they created.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
eckhart_defendship_LRT_desc_001.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：保卫飞船
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

我们的一个客户想出了一个“绝妙”的主意，想在真实现实场景中测试他们的空战狗斗技能。听起来情况不太妙，因为他们已经向我们求救了。

前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，帮助他们收拾烂摊子。

报酬将在合约顺利完成后支付。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_VE_desc_001.en:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>1 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_VE_desc_001.tr:
有个二五仔开着 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 刺探咱们行动。上次轰走时警告过，结果这货又换地方继续偷窥。既然听不懂人话，那就送份“大礼”。

他们在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近辐射云经常出没。关引擎藏好搞突袭最合适——有时候单飞，有时候带几架小飞机。第一波得靠你，不过咱在附近安排了支援船收尾。

如果你还需要点额外的动力，任务结束后主承包商还能拿到 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4> 。

- 斯托斯

Foxwell_EliminateAll_desc_001.en:
Looking for someone willing to take out the trash at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Guess a gang has settled in without the permission of the owners. So they’ve hired us to get them out whatever way we see fit. 

I’d bring plenty of ammo, if I were you. Doubt they’ll want to leave willingly. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateAll_desc_001.tr:
正在寻找愿意在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 清理垃圾的人。看来一个帮派未经业主许可就驻扎在那里。所以他们雇佣我们以我们认为合适的方式将他们赶出去。

如果我是你，我会带上充足的弹药。我估计他们不会自愿离开。

马库斯·克伦
福克斯韦尔安保
“安全，尽在掌握”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得 UEE 全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们始终欢迎新的干员加入我们的大家庭。如果您或您认识的任何人对此感兴趣，请与我们的合约代表联系。

headhunters_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_Att.en:
Got word from my Judge that we're to take back some of the outposts that CFP have taken over. They're a little pissed that CFP's getting as much of a foothold in the system as they are and think it's making the Headhunters look weak.

Found a couple candidates near [LOCATION] that could use a sweep. Icing on the cake is that the head of security there is [TARGET]. Not sure if you've heard of 'em, but they shot up a handful of Clips last month, so it's a win-win. Get some territory back and punch out someone who could really stand to get got.

Stows out.
headhunters_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_Att.tr:
我收到了判官的消息，要求我们夺回一些被繁荣公民控制的前哨站。他们有点生气，他们认为繁荣公民在这个星系中占据的地盘太多，同时还觉得这让猎头帮显得很软弱。

在 [LOCATION] 附近发现了几个可以清扫的目标。更妙的是，那里安保负责人是 [TARGET]。不确定你是否听说过他们，但上个月他们干掉了几名平民，所以这简直是双赢的局面。我们不仅能夺回一些领土，还能教训一个欠揍的人。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_VH_desc_001.en:
Some folks don’t seem happy with us. Got word that several sub-capital ships and a number of escorts are targeting our ops. Figured the best way to keep ‘em from causing us trouble is to hit them before they hit us. 

We got eyes on a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> that’s part of this squad, and it looks like they regularly pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, a spot tailor made for a surprise attack. A nearby emission cloud can hide you and anyone you bring along for muscle.

No sugarcoating it. This ain’t gonna be easy. But the payoff should make it worth your while. Finish the job and the main contractor gets a bonus <EM4>12 Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Plus, who knows what kinda good stuff you’ll find floating in all that wreckage.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_VH_desc_001.tr:
有些人就是见不得咱们好。有线报说几艘次主力舰带着护航队在搞咱们。先下手为强总比等着挨揍强。

发现他们的 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 经常经过 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ——这地方天生就是打埋伏的料。边边上的辐射云能藏住你和带来的帮手。

丑话说前头：这活儿不轻松。但赏金绝对对对得起卖命钱。活干完主承包商就能拿 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个堂会凭证</EM4>作为额外奖励。

再说了，天知道那些残骸里能捞出什么宝贝。

- 斯托斯

headhunters_bombingrun_E_CFP_desc_001.en:
It seems like I can't go a day without waking up to one of my people bitchin' and moanin' about how hard Citizens for Prosperity is making their life. 

Eventually we're going wipe those do-gooders out of the system, but for now I'll settle for some peace and quiet. 

Go to [LOCATION] and destroy the fuel stores CFP have got there. That should at least keep them out of our business for a bit.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_E_CFP_desc_001.tr:
似乎我每天醒来都免不了听到我的人抱怨繁荣公民让他们的生活有多困难。

最终我们会把那些自以为是的“好人”从这个星系赶出去，但我现在就想要一点安静。

去 [LOCATION] 毁掉繁荣公民在那里的燃料储备。这样至少能让他们暂时不来干扰我们。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

cfp_sabotage_generators_M_desc_001.en:
We have gotten word that the outlaws at [LOCATION] have begun recruiting with the hopes of launching a raid against Citizens for Prosperity. 

In order to deescalate the situation before it gets out of hand, we would like you to disable their power generators and halt their expansion. 

Pull this off and it could save a lot of lives.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_sabotage_generators_M_desc_001.tr:
我们得知在 [LOCATION] 的不法分子开始招募新成员以期对繁荣公民发起袭击。

为了在局势失控之前有所缓和，我们希望你能失效他们的发电机，阻止他们的扩张。

成功完成这项任务可能会拯救很多生命。

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民组织

cfp_ChainElimAll_1C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_M_.en:
We are currently looking for any qualified and available security operatives to head out to [LOCATION] and reclaim a CFP installation that had been taken by Headhunters. 

The group that's currently occupying the outpost is being led by [TARGET], a Headhunter of some note who's had a history of aggression against locals and CFP volunteers.

We need all Headhunters secured and [TARGET] taken out.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_1C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_M_.tr:
我们目前正在寻找任何合格且有空的安全人员前往 [LOCATION]，夺回被猎头帮占领的繁荣公民设施。

目前占领该前哨站的团伙由 [TARGET] 领导，这个猎头帮成员在对当地居民和繁荣公民志愿者的攻击历史有名。

我们需要确保所有猎头帮成员都被控制，并消灭 [TARGET]。

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
Some upstarts hit my hauling crew on their way to do a delivery. Our tracker is telling us that our ship’s still located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> so I need you to head over there and get the cargo. You’ll need <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to lug the goods from the ship.

I’d bet that whoever attacked us is still there waiting. Arm up, bring your crew, and if you can, give them one from me.

Once you’ve taken back our goods, drop it off at the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.tr:
几个不知天高地厚的暴发户半路伏击了我的运输队。追踪器显示咱们的船还停在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，你赶紧去把货捞回来，得靠<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>把东西从船上拖走。

我打赌那帮揍咱们的人还蹲在那儿等着。拿上武器，还有你兄弟，要是能就帮我给他们来上几发。

货拿到手，就直接送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯那儿，我这边给你结账。

- 刺痛

headhunters_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_Att.en:
Got a juicy assignment for any big-time enforcers who want to clear a big payday. Over at [LOCATION] we got some XenoThreat turf run by a real bastard named [TARGET]. Now if you've been in the system long enough, you've probably either heard of [TARGET] or at least seen their work. Skag has a tendency to leaves bodies wherever they go.

Anyway, Judge wants this area swept clean, that means you gotta hit all three clusters and kill every XenoThreat dirt you find. Kill enough and [TARGET] won't be able to hide.

Take them all out and have one on us.

Stows out.
headhunters_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_Att.tr:
我们有个丰厚的任务，适合任何想要赚大钱的强硬人士。在 [LOCATION] 那里，有一片由一个叫 [TARGET] 的家伙控制的异种威胁地盘。如果你在这个星系待得够久，可能听说过 [TARGET]，或者至少见过他们的手段。这帮杂种总是喜欢在他们走过的地方留下尸体。

无论如何，判官想要把这个区域清理干净，这意味着你得攻击所有三个集群，杀掉你找到的每一个异种威胁。杀得够多，[TARGET] 就藏不住了。

把他们全都解决了，咱们请你喝一杯。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_ChainElimAll_1C_AttackXT_M_d.en:
Just got clearance from my Judge to start banging back against XenoThreat. Been eyeballing some spots under their control near [LOCATION].

I'll give you the targets to hit, you kill everyone you find. Hell, I'd love to go myself, sounds like fun.

-Stows
headhunters_ChainElimAll_1C_AttackXT_M_d.tr:
刚刚得到了我的判官的批准，可以开始对异种威胁进行反击。我一直在盯着他们控制下的 [LOCATION] 附近的一些地方。

我会给你要攻击的目标，你只需杀掉你找到的所有人就行。真希望我能亲自去，听起来很有趣。

- 斯托斯

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Easy_Descriptio.en:
Managed to intercept a ship carrying some goods over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> but we hit a snag - our guys didn’t have enough space in their ships to store it. You wanna make some quick creds? Head over there and grab the stuff. Could be a few scavs there by now so be on your guard.

Just don’t forget to bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> as that shit’s heavy.

When you’re done, drop it off at the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we’ll take care of the rest.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Easy_Descriptio.tr:
我刚截下一艘运货的船，就在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那边，但咱自己人飞船装不下，东西堆那儿了。想赚点快钱不？赶紧过去把货弄走，现在那儿说不定已经蹲着几个打捞的了，小心点。

别忘了带个<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>，那玩意儿沉得要命。

弄完直接拉到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯那儿，剩下的交给我们。

斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_Att.en:
Need some good soldiers with a taste for violence to hit some XenoThreat hideouts located around [LOCATION]. I'll get you the specifics if you're down, but you'll have to wipe out two separate clusters of hideouts. 

We've also gotten word that [TARGET] is lurking around down there. If you take out enough XenoThreat dirtbags, they'll pop they're head up. 

When they do, put a round in it.

Stows out.
headhunters_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_Att.tr:
需要一些喜欢暴力的优秀士兵去攻击位于 [LOCATION] 附近的异种威胁藏身处。如果你有兴趣，我会给你详细信息，但你需要清除两个独立的藏身点。

我们也得到了消息，[TARGET] 正在那附近徘徊。如果你干掉足够多的异种威胁混蛋，他们会露面。

当他们露面时，给他们一枪。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_killship_asteroid_rank1_desc.en:
There's a nest that needs to be taken out around [LOCATION] that has been taken over by some squatters. We don't care about most of them, but word's gotten back to us that they're sheltering [TARGET] who has a long history of stealing Headhunter loot. Time's come to take them out.

Word is that [TARGET] is in a ship, but may rely on the base's defenses to protect them, so be careful. You kill 'em, you get paid. 

You know, the usual.

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_asteroid_rank1_desc.tr:
在 [LOCATION] 附近有一个巢穴需要清除，那里被一些侵占者占领了。我们对他们大多数人不感兴趣，但有消息传回来，他们正在庇护 [TARGET]，这个家伙有着偷窃猎头帮战利品的悠久历史。是时候解决他们了。

据说 [TARGET] 在一艘船上，但可能依靠基地的防御来保护自己，所以要小心。杀了他们，就能拿到报酬。

你知道的，老规矩。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_killship_asteroid_rank0_desc.en:
So here's the deal, Headhunters are looking to expand their talent pool and have a few openings for anyone who's got the stones.

There's a real piece of work named [TARGET] who thinks they've been really clever pinching cargo off of haulers moving through the system. We asked for a cut of their profits as a licensing tax to continue operating. When [TARGET] responded, they were very disrespectful.

We've tracked their ship to [LOCATION] and need them taken out. You should know, they're being smart and sticking close to some allies so they won't be alone.

Do this and we'll consider you for future Headhunter work.

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_asteroid_rank0_desc.tr:
事情是这样的，猎头帮想要扩大他们的人才库，现在有几个职位空缺，欢迎任何有胆量的人来应征。

有个家伙名叫 [TARGET]，觉得自己很聪明，从在星系中运输的货船那里偷走货物。我们要求他们支付一部分利润作为运营的许可税。当 [TARGET] 回应时，他们非常无礼。

我们追踪到他们的飞船在 [LOCATION]，需要将他们解决掉。你应该知道，他们很聪明，知道紧靠一些盟友就不会孤立无援。

完成这个任务后，我们将考虑让你参与未来的猎头帮工作。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_bombingrun_multi_E_CFP_desc_.en:
Every day it seems like Citizens for Prosperity is out here trying to snatch up more people for their shitty little cause and make life more difficult for hardworkin' folks like ourselves. 

I figure they could use a reminder about who really is in charge here. Head to [LOCATION] and bomb the living hell out of the area. 

Nothing like a bit of property damage to get a point across.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_multi_E_CFP_desc_.tr:
每天看起来繁荣公民都在这里试图拉拢更多人加入他们那可怜的事业，这让像我们这样辛勤工作的人生活得更艰难。

我想他们需要一个提醒，告诉他们谁才是真正的掌控者。前往 [LOCATION]，对那个地区进行猛烈轰炸。

没有什么比一些财产损失更能传达这个信息了。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

Intersec_ShipWaveAttack_DrawOutBoss_VH_D.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: [LOCATION]
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Heavy Gun-Ship
Briefing: An outlaw fleet lead by <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> has been planning a major strike against vital UEE infrastructure. InterSec has been tasked with dealing with this threat before their attack can be launched.

Gather a suitable amount of support craft and head to the engagement site. There you will have to engage with various squadrons before their leader will deem the situation dire enough to directly lead their forces. It is critical that they be neutralized in order to ensure the attack is stopped.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.
Intersec_ShipWaveAttack_DrawOutBoss_VH_D.tr:
任务说明

行动区域：[LOCATION]
敌对势力：不法分子
装备规格：重型炮艇
任务简报：一支由 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 率领的不法分子舰队正密谋对重要 UEE 基础设施发动大规模袭击。互安防务已受命在袭击实施前予以遏制。

请集结足够数量的支援舰艇，前往交战区域。您需先击溃多支敌方编队，其首领才会判定局势危急，进而亲自率队参战。务必将其彻底消灭，方能确保此次袭击被彻底阻止。

此致，
迪肯·托宾
运营经理
互安防务

本通讯内容是一份非约束性的提议，一旦接受，任何一方都可以在不另行通知的情况下立即终止。所有行动均由承包商自行承担风险，并且必须遵守相关星系的法律。

Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Easy_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has identified more outlaws who are planning an operation against UEE interests from within Nyx. Your mission will be to neutralize this potential threat before they can enact their plans.

Travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and dispatch the leader of these outlaws, <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> without hesitation. We have scouted a small number of ships, but our report suggest these are competent pilots - <EM4>bringing back up is advised.</EM4>

Remember that eliminating these outlaws not only serves the people of Nyx, but the UEE too.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.
Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Easy_001.tr:
任务说明

行动区域：尼克斯星系
敌对势力：不法分子
装备规格：战斗级飞船
任务简报：互安防务更多打算从尼克斯内部对UEE利益发动行动的不法分子。你的任务是在他们实施计划前，彻底消除这一潜在威胁。

前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，毫不犹豫地清除这些不法分子的头目 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>。我们侦察到少量飞船，但报告指出这些飞行员实力不俗，<EM4>建议带上支援。</EM4>

记住，铲除这些不法分子不仅服务于尼克斯的民众，也是为了维护 UEE 的利益。


此致，
迪肯·托宾
运营经理
互安防务

本通讯内容是一份非约束性的提议，一旦接受，任何一方都可以在不另行通知的情况下立即终止。所有行动均由承包商自行承担风险，并且必须遵守 UEE 和相关星系的法律。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_Battle.en: Bring me armor and other things and I give you special test armor. First version. Very special. Bring and I give. Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_Battle.tr: 带来给我护甲和其他东西并且我给你特殊测试护甲。最初版本。非常特别。带来我就给。再见。

vaughn_assassination_FPS_UGF_legal_boss_.en:
A senior security official by the name of [TARGET] is about to have their long career come to a very violent and sudden end. While they are currently at [LOCATION], they will not be easy to get to. I fear that a bit of work will be required to draw them out.  

I recommend killing enough of their underlings that they will be forced to face you personally. Of course, once they do decide to finally show their face, it should be a rather straightforward matter. 

Earnestly,
Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_FPS_UGF_legal_boss_.tr:
一名叫做 [TARGET] 的资深安保人士马上就要在从天而降的暴力之中和他的职业生涯告别了。他们目前驻扎在 [LOCATION]，并且不会很好对付。恐怕你需要费一番功夫才能引他们出来了。

我推荐击杀足够多的手下，他们就别无选择只能亲自出来迎战你。当然了，一旦他们决定露面，事情就很好办了。

你真诚的，
沃恩

vaughn_assassination_FPS_UGF_legal_desc_.en:
A security officer by the name of [TARGET] is in desperate need of an early retirement. They are currently stationed at [LOCATION] along with a host of other eager types in uniforms. 

Feel free to indulge your violent whims, but it is only the death of [TARGET] which will earn you my credit and thanks.

Earnestly,
Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_FPS_UGF_legal_desc_.tr:
一位名叫 [TARGET] 的安保官员急需提前退休。他们目前和许多同僚驻派在 [LOCATION]。

请随意发挥你的暴力天赋，但只有 [TARGET] 死了你才能得到信用点和我的感谢。

你真诚的，
沃恩

headhunters_ChainElimAll_AttackCFP_E_des.en:
Looking for anyone with an itchy trigger finger. We're looking to move against some CFP at  [LOCATION] and take it for ourselves. You gotta play this smart though. There are a bunch of satellite outposts around the main one and all of 'em got security, so you should take out each of these before you take the main base.

But hey, if you wanna jump right in the deep end and fight off all the reinforcements, that's on you. As long as you get it done.

Stows out.
headhunters_ChainElimAll_AttackCFP_E_des.tr:
寻找那些手指发痒的人，我们打算在 [LOCATION] 对一些繁荣公民采取行动，然后把它占为己有。不过，你得聪明地处理这件事。主前哨站周围有一堆边远前哨站，所有的都有安保，所以你应该先清除这些边远前哨站，再攻打主基地。

不过，如果你想直接跳进深处然后抵挡所有增援，那就看你自己了。只要能完成任务就行。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_E_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client of ours has been receiving anonymous threats in an attempt to blackmail them, and after a bit of leg work on our part, we’ve managed to trace it back to an individual who pilots a particular <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. The client wants us to take care of this blackmailer before they have a chance to make good. 

Based on our assessment, the target shouldn’t be too difficult to handle. They fly by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> on the regular, which has an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that’s an ideal spot to power down your ship and lie in wait. Sometimes the target is alone but they often travel with other single-seat ships as protection. Best be strategic when you launch your ambush or the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> could have a chance to get away. We don’t want to lose this one. We’ll alert other contractors in the area of the ambush so they can come help once it pops off.     

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The client has also added a bonus payment of <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_ShipAmbush_E_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：飞船伏击
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

我们的客户一直收到匿名威胁，试图勒索他们。经过我们一番调查，终于追查到一名驾驶 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的家伙，就是他干的。客户希望我们赶在对方金盆洗手之前，彻底解决掉这个敲诈犯。

根据我们的评估，目标并不难对付。他经常经过 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，那里有一片<EM4>辐射云</EM4>，正适合你关掉飞船、潜伏待机。目标有时独来独往，但更多时候会有一两艘单座飞船护航。你发动伏击时务必谨慎，否则 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 可能会溜走——我们可不能放跑他。一旦动手，我们会通知附近其他承包商赶来支援。

合约完成后立即付款。客户还会额外奖励主承包商 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个雇佣兵凭证</EM4>。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

Eckhart_EscortShips_S_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

This contract should only be considered by the most capable of pilots. A highly valued client is currently under attack at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and requires immediate extraction. They’re sitting in the hangar ready to leave, but are unable to move until the hostile ships in the area have been neutralized. 

I don’t see the outlaws stopping any time soon and our client’s reporting they’re packing high-grade weaponry on their ships. This will be a test of your skill as much as your endurance. Assemble whoever you need and head there immediately to assist them.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_EscortShips_S_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：护航飞船
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

这份合约只应考虑由最出色的飞行员来执行。目前有一位非常重要的客户在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 遭到攻击，需要立即撤离。他们已经待在机库里准备出发，但在该区域的敌对飞船被消灭之前无法行动。

我不认为那些不法分子会很快停止行动，而且我们的客户报告说他们的飞船上配备了高级武器。这不仅是对你耐力的考验，也是对你技能的考验。召集你需要的人，立即前往那里协助他们。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

Foxwell_EliminateSpecific_desc_001.en:
Looking to execute a bounty on <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. We’ve learned that they’re currently hiding out with some confederates at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

I’d be prepared to deal with the lowlifes hanging around <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, but our only real concern is that you land the target. 
    

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateSpecific_desc_001.tr:
我们准备执行对 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的赏金。我们得知他们目前与一些同伙藏身于 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。

我建议你准备好应对围绕在 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 附近的低等生物，但我们唯一真正关心的是你能否击倒目标。


马库斯·克伦
福克斯韦尔安保
“安全，尽在掌握”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得 UEE 全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们始终欢迎新的干员加入我们的大家庭。如果您或您认识的任何人对此感兴趣，请与我们的合约代表联系。

BHG_Certification_Easy_Desc.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM]
RISK ASSESSMENT: Low
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: Based on an assessment of your developing abilities, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn your Tracker Beginner's Permit.

This permit would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Low-Risk Targets (LRT). These criminals traditionally fly smaller ships but typically have a few escorts which makes them more challenging.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a LRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
BHG_Certification_Easy_Desc.tr:
--------------------------------------------------------
---------------------  赏金合约  ---------------------
--------------------------------------------------------

赏金猎人公会
处理与分配部门

赏金猎人公会已授权一份官方赏金

姓名：[TARGET]
星系：[SYSTEM]
风险评估：低
最后已知位置：[LOCATION]
已知关联：< 无 >
注意：根据对您的潜在能力评估，赏金猎人公会将为您提供获得“入门级赏金猎人执照”的机会。

此执照表示您有资格追踪和逮捕低风险目标（LRT）。这些犯罪分子一般会驾驶较小的船只，但通常也会跟着几个护送人员，使他们更具威胁。

您必须成功缉拿这个名为 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的低风险目标，才能通过认证，他最后一次出现是在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。


赏金猎人公会
追求正义

赏金猎人公会是一个由雇佣兵公会批准的安保服务，根据《外星贸易授权法案》被授权在 UEE 及其以外地区开展行动。

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM]

LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: With the progress you have made in developing your skills, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn your full Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Moderate-Risk Targets (MRT). These criminals traditionally fly medium-sized ships with several escorts. This class of outlaws make up a bulk of the contracts that typical bounty hunters will encounter.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a MRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

此执照表示您有资格跟踪和逮捕中等风险目标（MRT），他们通常会乘坐带有若干护送人员的中型船只，这类不法分子是赏金猎人在绝大多数任务中都要碰到的。

您必须成功缉拿这个名为 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的中等风险目标，才能通过认证，他最后一次出现是在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。

TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc_2.en:
If you want other way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> from Wikelo, have thing for you. Wikelo have need for <EM4>scrip</EM4> given out by Council group. Wikelo not part of thief souli, but has business from time to time.

If you bring scrips to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.
TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc_2.tr:
想要用其他方式获取<EM4>人情</EM4>？听好了。维科洛正在收购堂会组织发放的<EM4>凭证</EM4>。维科洛不当小偷，但偶尔也得和他们做生意。

把凭证带到 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> 来，可以兑换成人情。

再见。

TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc_1.en:
Wikelo has another way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> if you interested. 

Your Mercenary souli has <EM4>scrip</EM4> metal, used like favors, but made of very interesting metal that Wikelo need for new project.

If you bring scrips to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.
TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc_1.tr:
维科洛有另一种获取<EM4>人情</EM4>的方法，如果你感兴趣的话。

你们雇佣兵像人情一样使用一种金属<EM4>凭证</EM4>，但用的是维科洛新项目急需的特殊金属。

把凭证带到 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> 来，可以兑换成人情。

再见。

TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc_3.en:
Have new way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> from Wikelo. Hear much about worm things in radiation storms. Made up of many interesting parts that Wikelo find use for. 

If you bring parts to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.
TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc_3.tr:
有跟维科洛获取<EM4>人情</EM4>的新方法。听说过很多关于辐射风暴中的蠕虫生物的事。它们由许多维科洛能用得上的有趣部分组成。

如果你把东西带到 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>，可以用它们来换取人情。

再见。

headhunters_bombingrun_VH_desc_001.en:
Got a plan to take care of a rat I've been dealing with and need a hand.

Had a client default on some debts and now they've decided they ain't going to pay up. Got a tip that they're hiding out over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. If you can take out their fuel tanks they'll have no choice but to reconsider their crap decisions.

Just be sure you don't underestimate this slimebag. They might be dumb but they're not stupid, if you get me. I've heard this place is swarming with ships and turrets, you'd have to be a total nullbrain not to bring backup.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_VH_desc_001.tr:
我有个收拾某个卑鄙小人的打算，需要你搭把手。

有个客户赖账，现在居然决定彻底耍赖不付钱了。我收到消息，这货正躲在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那儿。你要是能把他们的燃料罐给炸了，他们除了重新考虑自己糟糕决定之外别无选择。

不过千万别小瞧这号混蛋。他们虽然蠢，但也不傻，你懂我意思吧？听说那地方到处都是飞船和炮塔，除非你是脑子进水的大白痴，否则肯定得带点帮手去才行。

-斯托斯通讯完毕

headhunters_killship_gen_mrt_desc_001.en:
Another gang tried to make a move and carve out some territory for themselves. They failed but Headhunters don't forget. We've taken out most of them but one of the last members named [TARGET] has been spotted flying around [LOCATION].

Odds are they're getting desperate, so don't underestimate them in the fight.

You'll get paid when it's done.

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_gen_mrt_desc_001.tr:
又有一个帮派试图出手，想要占领一些领地。他们失败了，但猎头帮可不会忘记。我们已经拿下了大部分人，但最后一个成员名叫 [TARGET] 最近被发现正在 [LOCATION] 附近飞行。

他们很可能孤注一掷，所以在战斗中别小看他们。

完成后你会收到报酬。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_H_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Looking for a competent contractor who can recruit a wingman to help execute an ambush. The target is a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> which has been involved in several operations against one of our most important clients. By neutralizing it once and for all, it’ll make our client’s life a hell of a lot easier. While the [TARGET] is our focus, they usually don’t fly anywhere without a sizable escort, including large craft. 

We’ve gotten word that this group will be passing by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon. Any chance you could hurry and beat them there? That spot has an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that you can power down your ship and hide in. Then when they pass, you should have the upper hand.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The client knows this one will be tough, so they threw in a bonus payment of <EM4>8 MG Scrip</EM4> that’ll go to the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_ShipAmbush_H_desc.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约 & 派遣

合约类型：飞船伏击
授权代码 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

寻找一位能招募副手协助伏击的靠谱承包商。目标是一艘 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，这个目标已经参与了几次针对我们最重要客户的行动。彻底消灭它之后将大大减轻我们客户的麻烦。虽然 [TARGET]是我们的主要目标，但它通常会带着大量的护卫舰只（包括大型飞船）出行。

我们得到消息，这个团伙很快会经过 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。你有没有可能加快速度赶到那里？那个地方有一片<EM4>辐射云</EM4>，你可以利用它让飞船停下来并藏起来。等他们经过时，你就能占尽上风。

合约完成后立即付款。客户知道这活儿不好干，所以额外加了 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 个雇佣兵凭证</EM4>作为奖金，直接给主承包商。

该合约不可转让。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的和/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

headhunters_eliminateall_XT_derelicts_de.en:
One of our Judges caught wind of XenoThreat trying to move in on our territory. Seems like they’re trying to take over [LOCATION]. We don’t want to let those psychos get any more of a foothold in system than they already have, so we’re putting some creds on the line to get ‘em to back off.

We want you to come down on them hard. Don’t let up till the whole place is a graveyard. We’ll send your payment once the bodies are ready to bury.

- Stows out.
headhunters_eliminateall_XT_derelicts_de.tr:
我们的一位法官打听到了异种威胁试图侵入我们领土的风声。 看起来他们正试图抢夺 [LOCATION]。 我们不想让这帮神经病在该星系中获得更多的立足点，因此我们将采取一些措施来让他们退缩。

我们希望你狠狠的教训一下他们。 直到整个地点都变成墓地之前，不要放松。 一旦他们的尸体准备好入土，我们就会向您发送报酬。

- 斯托斯通讯完毕。

TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc.en:
Maybe Wikelo not have something you want made (that strange, but okay). Old souli would give out <EM4>favors</EM4>, very good way to prove that you do work for me. Collect enough and trade when I have something you want.

Bring things to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and will trade for favor.

Bye.
TheCollector_Conversion_Favors_Desc.tr:
也许维科洛没有你想要的东西（这很奇怪，但没关系）。老商会会发放 <EM4>人情</EM4>，这是证明你为我工作的好方式。收集足够的人情，等我有你想要的东西时再来交换。

把东西带到 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>，我会用人情来交换。

再见。

Tutorial01_MissionDesc.en:
Congratulations on taking your first steps into the universe!

Over the course of this tutorial, you’ll learn how to get around both on foot and in space. 

First up is helping you familiarize yourself with some basic movement controls and the use of your mobiGlas while still inside your “Hab” (or habitation). Follow the objectives and hints on your HUD (heads-up display) to proceed through this mission.
Tutorial01_MissionDesc.tr:
恭喜您，迈出了探索宇宙的第一步！

在接下来的教程里，您将会学习如何在太空中以及在地面徒步探索宇宙。

首先我们会帮您熟悉一些基础移动操作，并在您仍身处“胶囊公寓”（或是住宅）中时熟悉一下mobiGlas的使用方法。请跟随 您的 HUD（抬头显示）上的目标与提示来继续完成本任务。

Tutorial02_MissionDesc.en:
Well done!

With the first part behind you, you should now have some basic familiarity with the movement controls, managing your hunger and thirst, and some of the core functionality of your mobiGlas – namely the Contract Manager and your Journal.

This next section will help you familiarize yourself with [LOCATION] and take you to visit [STORENAME], a weapons store here in [LOCATION].

You can shop there, and at other stores like it, using United Earth Credits (UEC). During the Alpha phase of Star Citizen’s development, we will be using a currency called aUEC (Alpha United Earth Credits). This is a temporary currency specifically designed for testing the in-game economy and balance.
Tutorial02_MissionDesc.tr:
干得漂亮！

在完成了教程的第一部分后，您现在应该对基础移动控制、自身饥渴状态管理、还有一些mobiGlas的核心功能——即合约管理和日志都有所了解了。

接下来的部分将会帮您熟悉一下 [LOCATION]，并带您去逛一下 [LOCATION] 的武器店 [STORENAME]。

您可以使用联合地球信劵（UEC）在这些商店中进行购物。在星际公民的阿尔法测试阶段，我们会使用名为aUEC（阿尔法联合地球信劵）的货币。这是一种专门用于测试游戏内经济和平衡系统的临时货币。

Tutorial03_MissionDesc.en:
You’re almost through with the tutorial. All that remains is to take flight!

With your business in [LOCATION] finished, it’s time to leave the city – and eventually the planet. Make your way to the [TRANSITNAMESHORT] transit shuttles. These shuttles can take you all around [LOCATION] – but your destination is the spaceport, where an Anvil C8 Pisces has been temporarily provided for you.

This snub scouting ship is a great starter vessel, perfect for new pilots looking to get their wings.
Tutorial03_MissionDesc.tr:
您马上就要完成本教程了。接下来就该起飞了！

既然您已经处理完了 [LOCATION] 的事务，那么是时候离开城市了——接下来还会离开这颗星球。请前往 [TRANSITNAMESHORT] 乘坐穿梭机，这些穿梭机可以带您前往 [LOCATION] 各地。不过当前您的目的地是空港，在那里会有一艘铁砧航天的 C8 双鱼座临时供您使用。

这艘方正小巧的探索船是艘很棒的新手船，非常适合想要展翅高飞的新手驾驶员们使用。

TheCollector_Ships_Intrepid_Desc.en: If you are looking for Intrepid ship that more intrepid. Wikelo can help. Bring things and you will get special touches on ship by Wikelo and pretty new coat to it. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Intrepid_Desc.tr: 你找比无畏飞船更无畏的船吗。维科洛能帮忙。带上你的东西，你的船维科洛给你特别照顾。还有新外观，漂亮得很。再见。

northrock_boarders_890J_desc_001.en:
An executive client just informed us that their 890 Jump had been intercepted at [LOCATION] and boarded by outlaws. They would prefer to have this handled privately owing to the sensitive nature of proprietary data that's being stored aboard. 

Your first priority will be to clear all outlaws as quickly as possible so that a recovery team can be dispatched to return the ship to the owner. The longer the outlaws have control of the vessel, the higher the chance it will be lost. I recommend you acquire a team for this outing to expedite matters. 

Note that thanks to a small contingent of Security Personnel who stayed aboard, all surviving members of the crew were able to flee in an escape craft. The current status of the remaining security is unknown, but just in case, keep an eye out for friendlies when you engage the hostiles.

Secondly, if at all possible, the client is *very* interested in preventing the theft of the aforementioned data. If you are able to stop the theft of their confidential data stores before they are transmitted, a generous bonus will be issued.

Needless to say, this is a client I would very much like to keep happy. 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group
northrock_boarders_890J_desc_001.tr:
一位行政客户刚刚向我们发出求救信号，他们的 890 跃动在 [LOCATION] 被拦截并被不法分子登上了船。因为船上存了一些比较敏感的私人数据，所以他们更希望能私下处理这个问题。

你的首要任务是把不法分子以最快的速度清理掉，这样一支救援小组就能派遣过去把船返还给船主。让这些非法之徒控制这艘船的时间越长，它被抢走的可能性就越大。为了能更快速的解决问题，我建议你组织一个特勤小组来执行此任务。

需要注意的一点是，船上所有幸存的船员都在船上的私人安全部队的保护下坐救生艇安全逃离了。不过，现在船上的状况仍然无法确定，为了以防万一，执行任务的时候请务必留意是否还有友军，以免误伤。

还有，如果可能的话，我们的客户会“非常乐意”看到你能把飞船内的数据保护下来不被盗走。如果你能成功阻止这些机密数据以远程传输的方式被盗走，会有一笔非常丰厚的额外奖金等着你。

如果换作是我的话，我会尽全力完成这位客户的要求让他满意。

布雷登·科查多
后勤官员 - 斯坦顿分部
北境之岩服务团队

Kaboos_Intro_Description.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Unknown
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec has been enlisted by the UEE to gather intel on a group of <EM4>black marketeers dealing in Vanduul parts</EM4>, that have been linked to the illegal Vanduul experiments happening at ASD’s Onyx Facility. The UEE is eager to understand and put an end to their operations.

Based on evidence extracted from the ASD facilities, we’ve potentially managed to track down the location of one of their storage sites.

Once accepted, head over to the old <EM4>QV Planet Services Logistics station</EM4> and we’ll be in touch.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Kaboos_Intro_Description.tr:
任务说明

行动区域：尼克斯星系
敌对势力：未知
装备规格：战斗级飞船、单兵武装
任务简报：互安防务已受 UEE 委托，搜集一群涉及剜度部件黑市交易的不法分子的情报，这些人与联合科学与开发公司玛瑙设施内非法的剜度实验有关。UEE 迫切希望了解并终结他们的活动。

根据从 ASD 设施中提取的证据，我们可能已经锁定了他们其中一个藏匿点的位置。

接受任务后，前往旧的<EM4> QV 行星服务物流空间站</EM4>，我们会与你联系。


此致，
迪肯·托宾
运营经理
互安防务

本通信内容包含机密内容，仅限收件人阅读。如误收请忽略并通知发件人。所有行动均由承包商自行承担风险，并须遵守适用的 UEE 及星系法律。
